programme.desc: Si King and Dave Myers discover the culinary delights of Corsica, starting out in a delicatessen to get a taste of the local cuisine, including the figatelli sausage. The owner explains how most of the islands food is made up of a holy trinity of ingredients - meat, cheese and chestnuts, a list that forms the basis of the bikers exploration

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: Ree prepares her teenage sons favourite food, including meatball subs, spicy mac and cheese, and confetti blondies

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: Its Ree and Ladds birthdays so they celebrate with skillet spaghetti with meatballs and garlic bread. Then, they enjoy a black forest cake for dessert

programme.title: Jamies One-Pan Wonders
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver offers a solutions-based guide to make brilliantly easy and delicious meals all cooked in one pan, pot or dish. In this episode, he whips up super-speedy smashed lemongrass chicken, sweet potato chilli with homemade nachos, and a chocolate party tray cake with tinned mandarin and buttercream filling

programme.title: Jamies One-Pan Wonders
programme.desc: Jamie cooks two one-pan recipes that are ideal for busy lives: his take on shakshuka with asparagus, broccoli and harissa, plus an outrageously good pulled pork that can be batched up, frozen and used in loads of meals whenever you need it

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa - Back to Basics
programme.desc: Ina Garten and her friends Eli Zabar and David Ziff prepare Mediterranean-inspired dishes

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa - Back to Basics
programme.desc: Ina prepares a fool proof menu for any special occasion. The buffet table includes tarragon potato salad, chunky blue cheese and vegetable coleslaw

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Four bakers remain in the hunt for the title of Britains best amateur baker, but they all need to raise their game when they tackle a trio of classic patisserie confections in the semi-final. A petits fours-making challenge provides an early test of nerves, before the quartet face the toughest technical task in the shows history - creating a fraisier, a sponge cake filled with mousse and strawberries. As tempers rise and confidence falters, the contestants have one last chance to impress judges Paul Hollywood and Mary Berry by baking a showstopping choux gateau - before discovering who has earned a place in the 2012 final. Presented by Sue Perkins and Mel Giedroyc

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: After weeks of pastries, cakes and sponges, collapsing gingerbread houses and dodgy doughnuts, there are only three remaining bakers. But only one can be crowned the winner, and to prove they have what it takes the finalists face their most demanding challenges yet. Over two days, they must create a perfect pithivier, or puff-pastry pie, before making fondant fancies and their last showstopper - the notoriously difficult chiffon sponge. Only then will judges Paul Hollywood and Mary Berry decide who deserves the 2012 title. Presented by Mel Giedroyc and Sue Perkins

programme.title: James Martins French Adventure
programme.desc: The chef travels through France to visit the locations that inspired his culinary career, beginning at the Chateau Cheval Blanc in Saint-Emilion, before going back to the kitchens of the Hostellerie de Plaisance, where he worked as a lad more than 30 years ago. He rounds off his trip by cooking at an award-winning vineyard

programme.title: James Martins French Adventure
programme.desc: The chefs journey continues along the Canal du Midi in southern France, starting in Carcassonne, where he joins the tourists taking in the sights and doing a little shopping. After cooking up a delicious fish stew on the banks of the canal, James hops aboard a boat for a trip towards the coast and is treated to a traditional cuttlefish lunch cooked in the boats tiny kitchen

programme.title: Marcus in the Med: Mallorca
programme.desc: Marcus looks for lunch ingredients in the market in Palma. He makes chilled tomato soup, then chop chop salad with watermelon, pickled rind, and feta.

programme.title: Marcus in the Med: Mallorca
programme.desc: Marcus visits a chef who cooks everything on his outside BBQ using wood grown on his farm. Inspired, Marcus fires up his BBQ to make pork chops.

programme.title: Rick Steins Food Heroes
programme.desc: The celebrated seafood chef begins a culinary romp around Britain, sampling some of the local dishes he holds dear. His journey begins in Lands End, where he goes on a pigeon shoot, before fishing for mackerel on the coast of Falmouth. Culinary highlights include forgotten dishes like pigeon and peas, and clotted cream with langoustine quiche

programme.title: Rick Steins Food Heroes
programme.desc: The seafood chef continues his culinary tour of Britain, meeting happy pigs on the Isle of Wight, sampling real cider in Somerset and tasting hot peppery watercress from Hampshire before tickling his tastebuds with Thomas Hardys favourite cheese

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Guy Fieri visits a husband-and-wife team in Miami, dishing out primo Peruvian sandwiches, while in Wilmington, a funky joint cooks up the flavours of Panama

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Guy Fieri visits a restaurant in California serving spicy pork and gnocchi, before travelling to a bakery-restaurant making meatloaf in Wilmington

programme.desc: Adam Richman tries out the cuisine in Charleston, South Carolina, where he is challenged to eat 10 increasingly hot and spicy sushi rolls

programme.desc: Guy Fieri visits a sprawling barbecue complex in San Antonio, where some diners fly in via helicopter

programme.title: Rick Steins Food Heroes
programme.desc: The seafood chef continues his culinary tour of Britain, meeting happy pigs on the Isle of Wight, sampling real cider in Somerset and tasting hot peppery watercress from Hampshire before tickling his tastebuds with Thomas Hardys favourite cheese

programme.title: The Hairy Bikers Mediterranean Adventure
programme.desc: Si King and Dave Myers explore the culinary delights of Provence in southern France. Starting out in Marseille, they meet a Moroccan woman who runs a welcome centre where immigrants can eat together - and who makes a fish stew to die for. Travelling west, they learn about the culinary influence of the Romans who conquered Europe 2,000 years ago, try a breakfast of pastry filled with spicy octopus, and dine with a Catalan farmer and his family on a regional speciality of barbecued snails

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: Ree Drummond answers questions from friends, townsfolk and visitors to Pawhuska. She shares her ribeye banh mi Vietnamese sandwich and other tasty recipes

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: Ree Drummond cooks a spring feast while Ladd and the cowboys are busy on the ranch. She makes pork tenderloin with herby mustard cream, and mac and cheese primavera

programme.title: Jamies One-Pan Wonders
programme.desc: Jamie cooks up three delicious one-pan recipes: his super-speedy smoked salmon pasta, a loaded beef burger with sweet red peppers, pickles and mustard, and gorgeously soft and sticky toffee apple buns

programme.title: Jamies One-Pan Wonders
programme.desc: Jamie wraps up the series with three more one-pan wonders - an unbelievably tasty aubergine burger, the quickest sesame-seared salmon supper, and chickpea and squash casserole, a batch meal you can turn into a whole host of delicious dishes

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa - Back to Basics
programme.desc: American chef Ina Garten transforms classic dishes with new ingredients and cooking methods

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa - Back to Basics
programme.desc: Ina Garten cooks modern-day comfort classics including miniature grilled cheese sandwiches and seafood pot pie

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Thirteen contestants battle it out to be named 2013s best amateur baker, facing tasks devised by judges Mary Berry and Paul Hollywood. They must first make a sandwich cake, before having to follow Marys basic recipe for angel food cake in the opening technical challenge. The showstopper round involves producing a chocolate-based cake and is the final chance to avoid being the first to leave the tent. Mel Giedroyc and Sue Perkins present

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: The 12 remaining contenders face three tasks designed to test their bread-making skills, beginning by making 36 perfectly thin and crispy bread sticks. For the technical challenge they have to prepare a batch of English muffins, before ending with show-stopping loaves - from a Christmas wreath to a proud peacock. Mel Giedroyc and Sue Perkins present, with Paul Hollywood and Mary Berry judging the contenders efforts

programme.title: James Martins French Adventure
programme.desc: The chef visits the Languedoc region, famous for its wine and the hearty, meaty dish cassoulet, and stops at a roadside fruit stall owned by a couple of British expats, before creating an unusual dish using melon and onion rings. He meets a modest chef who prepares a mouth-watering cassoulet, before staying at an 18th-century coach house and visiting a museum dedicated to Citroen 2CVs

programme.title: James Martins French Adventure
programme.desc: The chef travels through Charente in south-west France, visiting a distillery in the Cognac region, meeting a miller who still uses traditional methods to make award-winning brioche loaves, and following in the Queen Mothers footsteps with a visit to Chateau de Venteuil, home of the De La Rochefoucauld family. Along the way he makes classic French onion soup and a salad incorporating some of the regions best produce, and pays homage to the patron saint of pastry chefs with a stunning dessert

programme.title: The Hairy Bikers Mediterranean Adventure

programme.title: Jamie Oliver: Cooking for Less
programme.desc: With the rising cost of food and energy, Jamie Oliver is on a mission to make delicious dishes that wont break the budget

programme.title: Jamies Comfort Food
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver gives some of the nations favourite dishes a twist, reinventing British classics like shepherds pie, rustling up outdoor treats and transforming old-school desserts such as pavlova and sticky-toffee pudding. In the first edition, the chef takes on three comfort foods at his home in Essex, and hes joined by friend Christian, aka DJ BBQ, to reveal his ultimate burger - including what cut of meat to use, how to cook it and what to have on the side. Plus, Jamies secret sauce recipe

programme.title: Jamies Comfort Food
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver is joined by his friend, the Italian chef Gennaro Contaldo, to make bolognese ravioli, and also creates the ultimate cheese toastie as well as his take on the nations favourite dish - chicken tikka masala - cooked over an open fire

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Guy Fieri heads east to get a taste of the South. He checks out meatloaf in New Hampshire, extra-spicy shrimp in North Carolina and seafood stew in Florida

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: In New Hampshire, Guy Fieri checks out a joint that puts Thai in their tacos, and a local gem in North Carolina fires up monster barbecue

programme.title: Man v Food
programme.desc: Adam Richman visits Princes Hot Chicken in Nashville, Tennessee, an eatery famous for its fried hot chicken, prepared with spices, topped with pickles and placed over white bread

programme.title: Man v Food: Best Of
programme.desc: Adam travels to North Carolina to try a 20-ounce bacon double-cheeseburger. Later, he is given one hour to finish off one of the spiciest burgers in Texas

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Guy Fieri visits an El Salvadoran cafe in Santa Fe, a barbecue joint in Salt Lake City, and a Creole restaurant in Mississippi

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: A Mediterranean-style restaurant in Tennessee, a cafe in Minnesota with wild rice French toast, and a turkey dinner in Kentucky

programme.title: Cake Boss

programme.title: James Martins French Adventure
programme.desc: The chef ends his excursion at the Bois de Boulogne, a park on the outskirts of Paris, coinciding with the hosting of a prestigious steeplechase event at its Auteuil Hippodrome. programme.title: Rick Steins Food Heroes
programme.desc: The celebrated seafood chef begins a culinary romp around Britain, sampling some of the local dishes he holds dear. His journey begins in Lands End, where he goes on a pigeon shoot, before fishing for mackerel on the coast of Falmouth. Culinary highlights include forgotten dishes like pigeon and peas, and clotted cream with langoustine quiche

programme.title: Rick Steins Food Heroes
programme.desc: The seafood chef continues his culinary tour of Britain, meeting happy pigs on the Isle of Wight, sampling real cider in Somerset and tasting hot peppery watercress from Hampshire before tickling his tastebuds with Thomas Hardys favourite cheese

programme.title: The Hairy Bikers Mediterranean Adventure
programme.desc: Si King and Dave Myers explore the culinary delights of Provence in southern France. Starting out in Marseille, they meet a Moroccan woman who runs a welcome centre where immigrants can eat together - and who makes a fish stew to die for. Travelling west, they learn about the culinary influence of the Romans who conquered Europe 2,000 years ago, try a breakfast of pastry filled with spicy octopus, and dine with a Catalan farmer and his family on a regional speciality of barbecued snails

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: Ree Drummond answers questions from friends, townsfolk and visitors to Pawhuska. She shares her ribeye banh mi Vietnamese sandwich and other tasty recipes

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: Ree Drummond cooks a spring feast while Ladd and the cowboys are busy on the ranch. She makes pork tenderloin with herby mustard cream, and mac and cheese primavera

programme.title: Jamies One-Pan Wonders
programme.desc: Jamie cooks up three delicious one-pan recipes: his super-speedy smoked salmon pasta, a loaded beef burger with sweet red peppers, pickles and mustard, and gorgeously soft and sticky toffee apple buns

programme.title: Jamies One-Pan Wonders
programme.desc: Jamie wraps up the series with three more one-pan wonders - an unbelievably tasty aubergine burger, the quickest sesame-seared salmon supper, and chickpea and squash casserole, a batch meal you can turn into a whole host of delicious dishes

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa - Back to Basics
programme.desc: American chef Ina Garten transforms classic dishes with new ingredients and cooking methods

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa - Back to Basics
programme.desc: Ina Garten cooks modern-day comfort classics including miniature grilled cheese sandwiches and seafood pot pie

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Thirteen contestants battle it out to be named 2013s best amateur baker, facing tasks devised by judges Mary Berry and Paul Hollywood. They must first make a sandwich cake, before having to follow Marys basic recipe for angel food cake in the opening technical challenge. The showstopper round involves producing a chocolate-based cake and is the final chance to avoid being the first to leave the tent. Mel Giedroyc and Sue Perkins present

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: The 12 remaining contenders face three tasks designed to test their bread-making skills, beginning by making 36 perfectly thin and crispy bread sticks. For the technical challenge they have to prepare a batch of English muffins, before ending with show-stopping loaves - from a Christmas wreath to a proud peacock. Mel Giedroyc and Sue Perkins present, with Paul Hollywood and Mary Berry judging the contenders efforts

programme.title: James Martins French Adventure
programme.desc: The chef visits the Languedoc region, famous for its wine and the hearty, meaty dish cassoulet, and stops at a roadside fruit stall owned by a couple of British expats, before creating an unusual dish using melon and onion rings. He meets a modest chef who prepares a mouth-watering cassoulet, before staying at an 18th-century coach house and visiting a museum dedicated to Citroen 2CVs

programme.title: James Martins French Adventure
programme.desc: The chef travels through Charente in south-west France, visiting a distillery in the Cognac region, meeting a miller who still uses traditional methods to make award-winning brioche loaves, and following in the Queen Mothers footsteps with a visit to Chateau de Venteuil, home of the De La Rochefoucauld family. Along the way he makes classic French onion soup and a salad incorporating some of the regions best produce, and pays homage to the patron saint of pastry chefs with a stunning dessert

programme.title: Jamie Oliver: Cooking for Less
programme.desc: With the rising cost of food and energy, Jamie Oliver is on a mission to make delicious dishes that wont break the budget

programme.title: Jamies Comfort Food
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver gives some of the nations favourite dishes a twist, reinventing British classics like shepherds pie, rustling up outdoor treats and transforming old-school desserts such as pavlova and sticky-toffee pudding. In the first edition, the chef takes on three comfort foods at his home in Essex, and hes joined by friend Christian, aka DJ BBQ, to reveal his ultimate burger - including what cut of meat to use, how to cook it and what to have on the side. Plus, Jamies secret sauce recipe

programme.title: Jamies Comfort Food
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver is joined by his friend, the Italian chef Gennaro Contaldo, to make bolognese ravioli, and also creates the ultimate cheese toastie as well as his take on the nations favourite dish - chicken tikka masala - cooked over an open fire

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Guy Fieri heads east to get a taste of the South. He checks out meatloaf in New Hampshire, extra-spicy shrimp in North Carolina and seafood stew in Florida

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: In New Hampshire, Guy Fieri checks out a joint that puts Thai in their tacos, and a local gem in North Carolina fires up monster barbecue

programme.title: Man v Food

programme.title: Man v Food: Best Of

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Guy Fieri visits an El Salvadoran cafe in Santa Fe, a barbecue joint in Salt Lake City, and a Creole restaurant in Mississippi

programme.desc: The girls and Charles decide to surprise Caroline with a second honeymoon. When Grace Snider cannot make it, Mr Edwards volunteers for the job of looking after the children. programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Miss Beadle is injured and ordered to rest by Doc Baker, so Caroline takes over as substitute teacher of Walnut Grove School. During her tenure, an uneducated youth named Abel McKay enrolls, and is relentlessly teased because of his illiteracy

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Mary gives Laura a baby raccoon as a pet, but it bites both her and the family dog, leaving Charles worried it may have rabies

programme.title: The Waltons
programme.desc: A mysterious presence moving through the night strikes fear in the hearts of the Waltons Mountain residents, disrupting plans for a dance

programme.title: The Waltons
programme.desc: John-Boy raises money to save his newspaper by selling his land to a mining company, unaware of the damage the new owners will do to the environment

programme.desc: Siobhan makes life difficult for Brendan, and Kevins attempts to restore an old motorbike only succeed in angering his father, while the new love of Donals life causes consternation by going on the rampage. Light-hearted drama, starring Deirdre Donnelly, Gary Whelan and Frankie McCafferty

programme.title: Born and Bred
programme.desc: Part two of two. Ormston is engulfed by a political dispute when Tory councillor Eugenia Maddox returns to the village, armed with a plan for election, but opposition surfaces from an unexpected source. Meanwhile, Tom admits to Deborah he does not think his father is up to the job any more, but when someone close to home collapses, it is Arthur who is called upon to operate

programme.title: Doctor Finlay
programme.desc: A woman becomes convinced she has contracted syphilis from her husband, who indignantly claims he has never had an affair - raising suspicions that she is the one who has been unfaithful. Starring David Rintoul, Ian Bannen and Annette Crosbie

programme.desc: The lawyer takes on a divorce case and finds the womans husband is engaged in a silent battle of notes. Courtroom drama, with Leo McKern

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Colonel Flagg arrives at the 4077th demanding penicillin that he can barter for information, but all he gets is a shot in the backside to counteract the onset of appendicitis. Comedy, starring Alan Alda

programme.desc: Henry bids the team a tearful farewell when his discharge finally comes through - but Radar has bad news for those left behind. Korean War comedy, starring Alan Alda, McLean Stevenson and Gary Burghoff

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Part one of two. BJ Hunnicutt joins the 4077th as Hawkeye goes Awol to discover Trappers whereabouts - and to get away from the camps new commander Frank Burns. Comedy, starring Alan Alda, Gary Burghoff and Mike Farrell

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Part two of two. Frank assumes command of the 4077th as Hawkeye goes AWOL to find Trapper. Comedy, starring Alan Alda, Gary Burghoff and Mike Farrell

programme.desc: An elderly relative comes to stay and annoys the family, who urge her to leave. When John-Boy learns she is dying, he decides she should spend her last days with them

programme.title: Ballykissangel
programme.desc: The smart money is on Dannys horse Razor, which looks set to outstrip Doc Ryans trusty entry in the annual beach race, but Padraig backs a loser by inviting Orla OConnell to stay at his house. Quigley and his new partner Keeler clash over the golf clubs membership policy, and Ambrose has to deal with a recently released local drug dealer looking for revenge. Colin Farrell stars

programme.title: Born and Bred
programme.desc: Festive episode of the drama set in the Lancashire village of Ormston. Arthur gets into the yuletide spirit by playing pranks on son Tom, who is singularly unimpressed, while Deborah looks forward to the fresh start afforded by the new year, after the trauma of losing her baby. On a lighter note, news breaks that Santa and an elf have been on a crime spree, so local bobby Len and station-master Wilf set out to capture the dastardly duo, and decide the best way is to don disguise. After raiding Phyllis and Lindas wardrobes, the pair end up looking like Cinderellas ugly sisters. James Bolam, Michael French and Jenna Russell star, with John Henshaw, Peter Gunn, Maggie Steed and Naomi Radcliffe, plus guest appearances by Una Stubbs and Stephanie Cole

programme.title: Doctor Finlay
programme.desc: A patients deathbed murder confession presents Dr Finlay with a crisis of conscience, over whether to keep a secret entrusted to him in strictest confidence or see to it that justice is done

programme.desc: The lawyer accuses a policeman of framing his safecracker client and finds himself in deep legal water when he cannot back up his claim. Courtroom drama, with Leo McKern

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Frank is just getting used to the privileges of being commanding officer when a new one is appointed, and the 4077th welcomes its saviour with open arms. Korean War comedy, starring Alan Alda and Gary Burghoff

Later on, he finds the Ingalls girls, especially Carrie, to be more than he can handle. Meanwhile, Caroline cannot stop thinking about the children and worrying for their safety

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Miss Beadle is injured and ordered to rest by Doc Baker, so Caroline takes over as substitute teacher of Walnut Grove School. During her tenure, an uneducated youth named Abel McKay enrolls, and is relentlessly teased because of his illiteracy

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Mary gives Laura a baby raccoon as a pet, but it bites both her and the family dog, leaving Charles worried it may have rabies

programme.title: The Waltons
programme.desc: A mysterious presence moving through the night strikes fear in the hearts of the Waltons Mountain residents, disrupting plans for a dance

programme.title: The Waltons
programme.desc: John-Boy raises money to save his newspaper by selling his land to a mining company, unaware of the damage the new owners will do to the environment

programme.title: Ballykissangel
programme.desc: Siobhan makes life difficult for Brendan, and Kevins attempts to restore an old motorbike only succeed in angering his father, while the new love of Donals life causes consternation by going on the rampage. Light-hearted drama, starring Deirdre Donnelly, Gary Whelan and Frankie McCafferty

programme.title: Born and Bred
programme.desc: Part two of two. Ormston is engulfed by a political dispute when Tory councillor Eugenia Maddox returns to the village, armed with a plan for election, but opposition surfaces from an unexpected source. Meanwhile, Tom admits to Deborah he does not think his father is up to the job any more, but when someone close to home collapses, it is Arthur who is called upon to operate

programme.title: Doctor Finlay
programme.desc: A woman becomes convinced she has contracted syphilis from her husband, who indignantly claims he has never had an affair - raising suspicions that she is the one who has been unfaithful. Starring David Rintoul, Ian Bannen and Annette Crosbie

programme.title: Rumpole of the Bailey
programme.desc: The lawyer takes on a divorce case and finds the womans husband is engaged in a silent battle of notes. Courtroom drama, with Leo McKern

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Trapper and Hawkeye dissuade a GI from marrying a call girl who has TB, and enlist Radar to help a Korean soldier join his pregnant wife. Comedy, starring Alan Alda and Gary Burghoff

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: The camp prepares for a visit by General MacArthur, and even Klinger gets dressed up. Korean War comedy, guest starring Loudon Wainwright III, with Alan Alda

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: A flurry of devious activity is unleashed in the camp when pay day arrives. Burns buys a pearl necklace for his wife and a string of fakes for Hot Lips, while Trapper gives away his poker jackpot to get Hawkeye out of trouble. Korean War comedy, starring Alan Alda

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Colonel Flagg arrives at the 4077th demanding penicillin that he can barter for information, but all he gets is a shot in the backside to counteract the onset of appendicitis. Comedy, starring Alan Alda

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Henry bids the team a tearful farewell when his discharge finally comes through - but Radar has bad news for those left behind. Korean War comedy, starring Alan Alda, McLean Stevenson and Gary Burghoff

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Part one of two. BJ Hunnicutt joins the 4077th as Hawkeye goes Awol to discover Trappers whereabouts - and to get away from the camps new commander Frank Burns. Comedy, starring Alan Alda, Gary Burghoff and Mike Farrell

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Part two of two. Frank assumes command of the 4077th as Hawkeye goes AWOL to find Trapper. Comedy, starring Alan Alda, Gary Burghoff and Mike Farrell

programme.title: The New Avengers
programme.desc: An unknown enemy steals a new sleeping gas and unleashes it over London, leaving the citys banks and jewellery shops vulnerable to looting. Espionage adventure, starring Patrick Macnee, Gareth Hunt and Joanna Lumley

programme.title: The Avengers
programme.desc: Steed finds himself having to trust agent Melville, who has lost three partners and seems to be lying constantly, as he attempts to convict Lord Edgefield of blackmail. Patrick Macnee stars

programme.desc: Jonathan meets the chauvinistic coach of a high-school American football team, and tries to persuade him to allow girls to play

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.sub-title: The Lord Is My Shepherd - Part One

programme.title: The Waltons
programme.desc: Jim Bob helps Ike fix his motorcycle, and wants to use it to enter a race, to Olivias horror

programme.title: The Waltons
programme.desc: An elderly relative comes to stay and annoys the family, who urge her to leave. When John-Boy learns she is dying, he decides she should spend her last days with them

programme.title: Ballykissangel
programme.desc: The smart money is on Dannys horse Razor, which looks set to outstrip Doc Ryans trusty entry in the annual beach race, but Padraig backs a loser by inviting Orla OConnell to stay at his house. Quigley and his new partner Keeler clash over the golf clubs membership policy, and Ambrose has to deal with a recently released local drug dealer looking for revenge. Colin Farrell stars

programme.title: Born and Bred
programme.desc: Festive episode of the drama set in the Lancashire village of Ormston. Arthur gets into the yuletide spirit by playing pranks on son Tom, who is singularly unimpressed, while Deborah looks forward to the fresh start afforded by the new year, after the trauma of losing her baby. On a lighter note, news breaks that Santa and an elf have been on a crime spree, so local bobby Len and station-master Wilf set out to capture the dastardly duo, and decide the best way is to don disguise. After raiding Phyllis and Lindas wardrobes, the pair end up looking like Cinderellas ugly sisters. James Bolam, Michael French and Jenna Russell star, with John Henshaw, Peter Gunn, Maggie Steed and Naomi Radcliffe, plus guest appearances by Una Stubbs and Stephanie Cole

programme.title: Doctor Finlay
programme.desc: A patients deathbed murder confession presents Dr Finlay with a crisis of conscience, over whether to keep a secret entrusted to him in strictest confidence or see to it that justice is done

programme.title: Rumpole of the Bailey
programme.desc: The lawyer accuses a policeman of framing his safecracker client and finds himself in deep legal water when he cannot back up his claim. Courtroom drama, with Leo McKern

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Frank is just getting used to the privileges of being commanding officer when a new one is appointed, and the 4077th welcomes its saviour with open arms. Korean War comedy, starring Alan Alda and Gary Burghoff

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: The 4077th is under pressure with an artillery barrage moving closer, patients going downhill in the bitter weather, and Frank desperately ransacking Houlihans tent to recover his love letters. Comedy, starring Alan Alda, Mike Farrell, Larry Linville and Gary Burghoff

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: A clerical error leads to Hawkeyes father being mistakenly informed that his son is dead, and it is no easy matter setting the record straight. Korean War comedy, starring Alan Alda

programme.title: Brush Strokes

programme.title: Brush Strokes
programme.desc: Jacko finds himself out of a home, Eric and Jean are moving to Reigate, Veronica leaves for Sicily with Marcello, and Elmo is seen leaving the casino in his pink car with girlfriends

programme.title: Brush Strokes
programme.desc: The very first episode of John Esmonde and Bob Larbeys popular comedy series about the misadventures of a cocky painter. Jacko gets a parking ticket and nearly loses his job

programme.title: The New Avengers

programme.desc: The competition visits the Nottingham and Derby area. programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The competition continues in the Nottingham and Derby area. Car salesman Alistair hopes to step the competition up a gear. However, after narrowly avoiding an argument last night with Lesley, the veteran of the group, hes treading on thin ice. And hes serving up a bizarre menu, including chilli soup - for dessert - and prunes

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Nottingham, fun-loving funeral arranger Kim hosts an evening packed with games galore and a mixed bag menu. Fifty-seven-year-old Lesley is again the butt of car salesman Alistairs geriatric jibes and takes great delight in watching him put on the spot during a dance-off

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Customer relations associate and part-time drag queen Adam plans a theatrical night of flamboyance as the culinary competition continues in the Derby and Nottingham area. programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The final soiree in the Nottingham and Derby area sees 57-year-old Lesley counting on a night of glamour and glitz - plus some good home-cooked food - to secure the £1,000 prize. However, before any food is even dished up, the guests make a surprising discovery about the host

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition kicks off at My Way Guest House in Broompark, Co Durham, where Kaye Horner and her daughter Lily are counting on their cleanliness to gain top marks

programme.title: Four in a Bed

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third visit of the week takes place at Ambles House in Northampton, where Amanda hopes her homely hospitality will win over her guests

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Richard and Harriet Secular pride themselves on their high-end rooms at the Royal George in Tintern in Monmouthshire - and the guests are not disappointed, with plenty of praise for the hosts throughout the two days. Will the feedback mirror their experience?

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The BandB owners meet up for a final showdown, as Kaye and Lily bring Harriet and Richards blind issues to light before dishing the dirt on Sophie and Davids discoveries. Amanda wants to know why frank feelings were unleased when it came to her canine companion, Trudy. programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Fuzz Townshend and Tim Shaw help Darren, who was left disabled after a tragic road accident in which he saved his grandson, by fixing up his iconic 1989 Golf

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Fuzz Townshend and Tim Shaw take on one of the most divisive British sports cars ever made - a Triumph TR7. Can the team help make owner Barrys dream come true?

programme.title: The Dog House Australia
programme.desc: High-energy kelpie Tess could be the perfect training companion for eight-year-old Sophie. Lolla might be the right big, goofy dog that tai chi instructor Amanda is searching for

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud meets architectural designer Dan and interior designer Nina, who want to build a sleek, unique family house. But the plot they have bought, near a beautiful estuary in West Sussex, is dominated by a swampy pond that they are unable to fill in. Instead, they plan to make it central to their design, turning the pond into a biodiverse waterscape, and then floating their house above it. Its a challenge for anyone - but to save money, Dan is doing it largely himself, despite his limited experience with new builds

programme.title: Our Farm Next Door: Amanda, Clive and Kids
programme.desc: As winter turns to spring, the Owen family balance the pressures of lambing season with the race to get their farmhouse renovation watertight. Amanda and Clive digest exciting news from the planners which could see the scope of the renovation - and the workload- grow massively, while eldest Owen son Reuben teams up with sidekick and younger brother Sidney to tackle the ongoing drainage issues

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Documentary following life inside one of Britains busiest AandE departments at Kings College Hospital in south London. A doctor is shocked when a young woman arrives in resus with life-threatening swelling on her brain following a random attack by a stranger, while a mother faces an agonising wait as tests are carried out on her 12-year-old son, who was hit by a car and airlifted to Kings by emergency medics. A 90-year-old former circus performer is also in AandE after collapsing at home, and news of his colourful past quickly circulates among the staff

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Eighty-year-old Rose has fluid on her lungs and is having trouble breathing. Her daughters Christine, Sandra and Debbie put on brave faces around her bedside, convincing her that everything will be all right, but in the relatives room theres high emotion as they contemplate life without their mother. Also in resus at Kings College Hospital is Kevin, a 55-year-old trucker who has sustained injuries in a road accident

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: Paramedics help a man with a history of heart attacks experiencing severe chest pain. Treatment at the scene does little to improve his condition, so he is rushed to hospital. Paramedics also treat an elderly man whos collapsed underneath his bed, a baby struggling to breathe, and a 102-year-old woman who may have developed deep vein thrombosis but is reluctant to go to hospital

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Documentary following life inside one of Britains busiest AandE departments at Kings College Hospital in south London. A doctor is shocked when a young woman arrives in resus with life-threatening swelling on her brain following a random attack by a stranger, while a mother faces an agonising wait as tests are carried out on her 12-year-old son, who was hit by a car and airlifted to Kings by emergency medics. A 90-year-old former circus performer is also in AandE after collapsing at home, and news of his colourful past quickly circulates among the staff

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Eighty-year-old Rose has fluid on her lungs and is having trouble breathing. Her daughters Christine, Sandra and Debbie put on brave faces around her bedside, convincing her that everything will be all right, but in the relatives room theres high emotion as they contemplate life without their mother. Also in resus at Kings College Hospital is Kevin, a 55-year-old trucker who has sustained injuries in a road accident

programme.title: Strangers on a Plane
programme.desc: Wakefield waiter Jason hosts day three and channels his inner child with a drive in a pink stretch Cadillac and a day of fun in the sun at a water park. Plus, partying into the night at the citys Pride festivities

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Lynn Self and Ziggy Broome hope to impress with their two-star BandB Eden Lodge in Falmouth, Cornwall. However, the state of their property disappoints their fellow competitors. At dinner, James and Maria Church reveal the truth about their famous daughter Charlotte, and the following mornings breakfast reduces some of the guests to fits of giggles

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon OBrien arrive in York, where Henry struggles to squeeze into some motorcycle leathers and Simon gets into deep water when he tries to restore an aluminium boat

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Paul and Michelle from Greater Manchester want to find the perfect place to spend their retirement on Spains beautiful Costa Cálida, famous for its year-round warmth and relaxing atmosphere. The pair would like a secluded property within walking distance of shops and restaurants, so Jonnie Irwin shows them five such properties within their budget of £60,000

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: This competition takes place in and around Liverpool, where the first to host is 41-year-old taxi business owner Rob, who plans a Scouse-themed evening. The guests he is hoping to impress are 23-year-old fitness fanatic Toria, 44-year-old property developer Christine, 40-year-old South African business woman Sam, and 20-year-old student Inzy

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The second host in Liverpool, businesswoman Sam, plans a South African-themed evening. However, her food is a bit hit-and-miss on a night full of poor pronunciation, fashion faux pas and a bit of mischief over the main

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Gym worker Toria hosts the third party in Liverpool, and hopes a kissing game around the dinner table, along with her flaky flapjacks, will be enough to secure the £1,000 prize

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Undergraduate Inzy is the fourth host in Liverpool, and he is on a mission to prove students really can cook. The flirting between him and Toria continues, but will he allow love to stand in way of the competition?

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Liverpool, property developer Christine plans to wow her guests with a Spanish holiday-themed dinner party. However, the mood is rather more feisty than fiesta as on-going tensions finally come to a head and its not long before the honesty - and the sparks - begin to fly

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The first destination of the week is the Old Rose and Crown in Lickey, Birmingham, where guests have some problems with the paintwork and are missing fresh milk

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The second visit of the week is to Middlewick in Glastonbury, Somerset, run by Jill Barker and Inez Findlay, who hope their famously mystical location will enchant their guests

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third visit of the week is to The Griffin Inn, in Irnham, Lincolnshire, where hosts Jamie and Leila Benton Jones invite the BandBers to their very own village, steeped in history

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final visit of the week is to Crossroads House in Carlisle, owned by Julie and Alistair Musgrave, who pride themselves on their full English fry-up and Cumberland banger. Jamie and Leila are surprised by the BandBs roadside location but impressed by their newly spick-and-span room, while Jill and Inez dig into the mismatched decor in theirs. At drinks, Julie and Alistair reveal their entrepreneurial ambitions and are confident their breakfast offering will bring home the win. In the morning, Jamie and Leila are feeling rough after a restless night whilst in the kitchen Julie is experiencing a last-minute crisis of confidence

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The BandB owners meet for the last time to trade feedback, starting with The Old Rose and Crown, where Jamie and Leila lay into the linen. The BandBers discuss lukewarm reactions to the facilities, problems with paying for breakfast and picky comments about the paintwork. Things take an emotional turn when Julie and Alistair chew over their bad breakfast score. There are harsh truths, heated debates and disagreements as the payments are revealed before the winner is finally announced

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Tim Shaw and Fuzz Townshend delve into unknown territory when they transform Charlies beloved Lexus IS200 into a full-blown competition drift car

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Tim Shaw and Fuzz Townshend restore Adams Datsun 240k Skyline, an extremely rare Japanese classic from the 1970s. In fact, with only two others on the road, its the rarest car theyve ever taken on

programme.title: The Dog House Australia
programme.desc: Tripod Mr Norman has the cuteness factor covered, but he needs to tick all the Peacocks boxes. Plus, the already crowded Sorrell house needs to make room for Turbo Tess

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud follows the progress of ex-advertising man Geoff, who is selling his luxury villa in Spain and moving into a caravan while he project manages the construction of a dramatically cantilevered steel-framed house on the Essex coast, costing a total of £700,000. But after the anchoring steel has been drilled into the ground, he runs into the double trouble - Covid-19 and a collapse in the Spanish property market. Will he ever finish this complicated - and expensive - construction?

programme.title: Saving Country Houses with Penelope Keith
programme.desc: In Dorset, rain and storms threaten Mapperton Houses annual plant fair. In Staffordshire, the Cavenagh-Mainwaring family are dealing with leaks of their own at Whitmore Hall. Nova Guest is thrilled to sign off her summer season by inviting the first visitors in to the newly-restored Gunpowder Plot room at Ashby Manor, and at Chavenage in the Cotswolds, James and Emma are finally ready to open up their vaunted sauna project to guests

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: A 39-year-old man is flown to Londons Kings College Hospital after being involved in a head-on collision while driving a friends sports car, and doctors fear his injuries could leave him paralysed. Meanwhile, 21-year-old Thomassine requires treatment following a skateboarding accident and the staff see to Matias, 34, who has been dragged along a station platform by a moving train

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: The staff at Kings College Hospital treat patients on Valentines Day, including a 53-year-old psychologist who has injured his shoulder in a motorcycle accident. His partner is abroad and he doesnt want to worry her, so he decides to keep the incident a secret. Also in the AandE department are a man with a bleed on the brain and an elderly widower who has been bitten by his dog

programme.title: Saving Country Houses with Penelope Keith

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: The staff at Kings College Hospital treat patients on Valentines Day, including a 53-year-old psychologist who has injured his shoulder in a motorcycle accident. His partner is abroad and he doesnt want to worry her, so he decides to keep the incident a secret. Also in the AandE department are a man with a bleed on the brain and an elderly widower who has been bitten by his dog

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: Paramedics are called out to a woman who got tangled up in her dogs leads, leaving her lapsing in and out of consciousness on her 45th wedding anniversary. Meanwhile, a man is in severe pain with an umbilical hernia and a woman has a suspected seizure at work. The paramedics also attend a baby thats just been born, with the mother having to deliver her baby on the bathroom floor

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: At Nottinghams Queens Medical Centre, 87-year-old Joan is brought in after falling on a moving tram and cutting open the back of her head. Nineteen-year-old Rose faces life-changing injuries after a collision with a car and 13-year-old Prince has broken his leg in three places playing football

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Ten-year-old Henry is brought to Queens Medical Centre in Nottingham after being hit accidentally by a forklift truck driven by his dad. X-rays confirm that both his legs are broken. Nahum and Dean arrive by ambulance following a road traffic accident, and 94-year-old Pearl comes in after badly cutting her arm by trapping it in a lift

programme.title: Strangers on a Plane
programme.desc: Lisa hosts the second day and takes the gang on an off-road quad bike adventure followed by an evening with a Bob Marley tribute act. While most have a ball, yesterdays host just wants to bail

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Claire Hilton, who runs Robertsbrook Guest House in Swanage, Dorset, feels she has a good chance of winning the title of best BandB as another round of the competition gets under way. However, guests Lynn Self and Ziggy Broome have doubts over the cleanliness of their bedroom, and another couple are accustomed to more opulent surroundings

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Simon OBrien finds a barn containing a collection of replica Rolls-Royce cars, and Henry Cole tries his hand at driving a tractor as they continue their money-making tour

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Chris and Marie are looking for the perfect place to enjoy their retirement in Manilva on Spains Costa del Sol. Chris wants a property on a golf resort, while Marie wants to live closer to town. Danni Menzies hopes to help them find a happy compromise, with their budget of £125,000

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The competition visits the Nottingham and Derby area. American Hali kicks proceeding off with a travel-inspired menu, including Moroccan chicken cigars and an unusual dessert combination. With a very gregarious gathering of guests, the food plays second fiddle to a fun night of impressions, dance moves and kitchen chaos

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The competition continues in the Nottingham and Derby area. Car salesman Alistair hopes to step the competition up a gear. However, after narrowly avoiding an argument last night with Lesley, the veteran of the group, hes treading on thin ice. And hes serving up a bizarre menu, including chilli soup - for dessert - and prunes

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Nottingham, fun-loving funeral arranger Kim hosts an evening packed with games galore and a mixed bag menu. Fifty-seven-year-old Lesley is again the butt of car salesman Alistairs geriatric jibes and takes great delight in watching him put on the spot during a dance-off

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Customer relations associate and part-time drag queen Adam plans a theatrical night of flamboyance as the culinary competition continues in the Derby and Nottingham area. Can he get his guests begging for an encore, will Alastair and Lesley ever kiss and make up and what will Adams guests think of his secret hobby as a ufologist?

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The final soiree in the Nottingham and Derby area sees 57-year-old Lesley counting on a night of glamour and glitz - plus some good home-cooked food - to secure the £1,000 prize. However, before any food is even dished up, the guests make a surprising discovery about the host

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition kicks off at My Way Guest House in Broompark, Co Durham, where Kaye Horner and her daughter Lily are counting on their cleanliness to gain top marks

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The second visit of the week is to the Old Orleton Inn in Wellington, Shropshire, where an award-winning breakfast is on offer - but a lack of showers does not go down well

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third visit of the week takes place at Ambles House in Northampton, where Amanda hopes her homely hospitality will win over her guests

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Richard and Harriet Secular pride themselves on their high-end rooms at the Royal George in Tintern in Monmouthshire - and the guests are not disappointed, with plenty of praise for the hosts throughout the two days. Will the feedback mirror their experience?

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The BandB owners meet up for a final showdown, as Kaye and Lily bring Harriet and Richards blind issues to light before dishing the dirt on Sophie and Davids discoveries. Amanda wants to know why frank feelings were unleased when it came to her canine companion, Trudy. David and Sophie banish Harriet and Richards bathroom blues, before confronting Kaye and Lily with their cleanliness critique. After opinions are aired and differences debated, the payments are revealed and the winner is announced

programme.title: Dating Naked
programme.desc: A businessman and a bad boy compete to impress Kerri, while Chris feels that sparks are not flying between him and his keepers

programme.title: Jersey Shore
programme.desc: The room-mates deal with the fallout from the girl-fight and Angelina starts dating a guy from the club, while Jenni and Snooki clean up the smush room

programme.title: Jersey Shore
programme.desc: Mike threatens to tell Jose that Vinny and Angelina spent the night together. Meanwhile, Vinnys family comes to visit

programme.title: Sleeping with My Murderer

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Rob, Steelo, and Lolo endure some pain in the butt in tail trauma, meet young wedding guests that are little wedding wreckers, and party with people that are dancing too dirty

programme.desc: Buying goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: MTV Cribs
programme.sub-title: Bradley Simpson, Caprice, Perri and Mike

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation

programme.title: Hitlers Last Stand

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation

programme.desc: Airport workers strive to reunite passengers with their lost items including a prosthetic eye, a Gucci bag and a familys beloved Rolex

programme.title: To Catch a Smuggler
programme.desc: While inspecting commercial cargo from Mexico, Laredo CBP discovers liquid meth concealed within paint buckets. The load weighs 560 kgs, and is worth $24million. In Atlanta, HSI conducts a controlled delivery of an air conditioner filled with 2 kgs of meth. Two people are arrested, and even more drugs are confiscated. In Nogales, CBP pursues a trend of female body carriers, and busts a woman carrying 107 grams of fentanyl internally

programme.title: Made in a Day

programme.title: Lords of War

programme.title: Lords of War

From handguns to tanks, the stakes were never greater

programme.title: Who Do You Think You Are?

programme.desc: Davina McCall and Nicky Campbell present the stories of people who were abandoned as babies, helping them try to find their birth families and know their identities. David McBride was left in a car as a two-week-old infant in January 1962, while Helen Ward was left in a tartan bag in a telephone box in Dundalk in 1968

programme.title: The Yorkshire Auction House
programme.sub-title: A Gold Medal and A Hand Grenade
programme.desc: A surprise find in a clients garden has Anguss team stunned, but will a big silver key unlock a generous donation to a worthy charity?

programme.title: The Yorkshire Auction House
programme.desc: Angus receives a call from two sisters desperate to find new homes for their late fathers incredible collection of circus memorabilia

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Natasha Raskin Sharp and Charles Hanson explore the East Riding of Yorkshire, where Charles finds a few goodies on board a vintage double decker bus and learns all about the link between Dracula and the seaside town of Whitby. Meanwhile, keen ornithologist Natasha visits the coastal haven of Bempton Cliffs

programme.title: Who Do You Think You Are?
programme.desc: Celebrities trace their family trees and uncover facts about their heritage. In the first episode, actress Una Stubbs embarks on a quest to learn about the grandparents she never met. As she delves into their history, she uncovers a surprising connection between her paternal grandfather and the confectionery company she modelled for in the 1950s. Another coincidental link also comes to light - between her forebears chosen home town of Welwyn Garden City, Hertfordshire, and the areas founder, Ebenezer Howard

programme.title: Long Lost Family: What Happened Next
programme.desc: Davina McCall and Nicky Campbell revisit the stories of two women whose searches took them to opposite sides of the globe. Yasika Fernandos search for her Sri Lankan birth mother was watched by someone else born in the very same week and adopted from the very same convent, while Paula Stillie finally heads out to Montana to see her Native American aunts and uncles in person

programme.title: Celebrity Help! My House Is Haunted

The villagers believe the deaths are mere accidents, but Miss Pinkerton knows otherwise - and when shes later found dead on her way to Scotland Yard, Fitzwilliam feels he must find the killer before they can strike again. programme.desc: Adaptation of the mystery thriller, set in 1954. On a train to London, Fitzwilliam (David Jonsson) meets Miss Pinkerton (Penelope Wilton), who tells him that a killer is on the loose in the sleepy English village of Wychwood under Ashe. The villagers believe the deaths are mere accidents, but Miss Pinkerton knows otherwise - and when shes later found dead on her way to Scotland Yard, Fitzwilliam feels he must find the killer before they can strike again. programme.title: Richard E Grants Hotel Secrets
programme.desc: Richard E Grant travels to Venice, said to be the city with the highest concentration of luxury hotels on the planet. He discovers how a measuring error led to the building of the citys biggest swimming pool, tries out a 15,000 euro-a-night royal suite whose bed has been slept in by everyone from the Beckhams to Prince Charles and the Duchess of Cornwall, and visits a hotel that keeps its doors open even when water floods to knee height. He also finds out why breaking a window once earned Ernest Hemingway a 10 per cent discount on his room

programme.title: Goodfellas (1990)
programme.desc: An Irish-Italian boy from a poor neighbourhood grows up idolising the glamorous lifestyle of the Mafia. Taken under the wing of a mobster, he rises quickly in the world of organised crime. But he soon has to face the realities of murder and treachery, while his involvement in drug deals puts him at risk from both sides of the law. Martin Scorseses crime drama, starring Ray Liotta, Robert De Niro and an Oscar-winning Joe Pesci

programme.title: To Catch a Killer (2023)
programme.desc: Eleanor is a talented but troubled young rookie detective wrestling with the demons of her past, when she is called to the scene of a brutal mass shooting - the work of a new and terrifying murderer. The police and FBI launch a nationwide manhunt, but are thwarted at every turn by the killers enigmatic, and unprecedented behaviour. Despite her lack of experience, Eleanor is drawn deeper into the case as she, and her newfound mentor, realise that she may be the only person, given her own tortured psyche, who can understand the mind of this singular killer. Thriller, starring Shailene Woodley, Ben Mendelsohn and Ralph Ineson

programme.title: Gunpowder Milkshake (2021)
programme.desc: In her turbulent life as a professional assassin, Scarlet was cruelly forced to abandon her daughter Sam and go on the run. Years later, despite the estrangement, Sam has also grown up into a cold-blooded hitwoman. After a high-stakes mission spins out of control, Sam has no choice but to go rogue. This ultimately leads her back to her mother and her former sidekicks, who join forces against those who took everything from them. Action thriller, starring Karen Gillan and Lena Headey

programme.title: The Hanging Sun (2022)
programme.desc: Fleeing from his ex-employer, John, a reluctant assassin, seeks refuge in an isolated village, where he is faced with events that test his conscience. Drama based on the Jo Nesbo novel, starring Alessandro Borghi, Jessica Brown Findlay, Peter Mullan and Charles Dance

programme.title: The Day of the Jackal (1973)
programme.desc: A group of conspirators contracts the Jackal, a professional hitman, to assassinate President Charles de Gaulle of France. The killer starts to put his painstaking plans into action, creating a new identity, establishing his alibi and commissioning a custom-made weapon, while out-foxing the French police at every turn. Fred Zinnemanns adaptation of Fredericks Forsyth thriller, with Edward Fox, Michael Lonsdale, Alan Badel, Tony Britton and Cyril Cusack

programme.title: Collateral (2004)
programme.desc: A Los Angeles taxi driver picks up a sharp-suited fare and is shocked when a dead body almost plunges through his windscreen during the first stop on the journey. Michael Manns thriller, starring Tom Cruise and Jamie Foxx

programme.desc: Trapped in their Hollywood Hills home, a family fights for survival when caught between a raging wildfire and a pack of savage coyotes. Comedy thriller, starring Justin Long, Mila Harris and Brittany Allen

programme.title: Pets on a Train (2025)
programme.desc: When a gang of animal crooks set out on what should be a simple con, theyre swept into a train robbery. It falls to Falcon, a small-time raccoon thief, and Rex, a by-the-book police dog, to put their differences aside and protect the passengers aboard a runaway high-speed train. Animated adventure, featuring the voices of Wyatt Bowen and Daniel Brochu

programme.title: Coyotes (2025)
programme.desc: Trapped in their Hollywood Hills home, a family fights for survival when caught between a raging wildfire and a pack of savage coyotes. Comedy thriller, starring Justin Long, Mila Harris and Brittany Allen

programme.title: Materialists (2025)
programme.desc: Failed actress Lucy Mason is a star employee of the Adore matchmaking agency. She prefers the life of a singleton after her previous relationship with actor John imploded because of his precarious finances. At a clients wedding, Lucy meets the grooms brother, Harry, and politely rebuffs his amorous advances, suggesting he should enrol with Adore. Harry persists and Lucy agrees to go on a date, on condition that he signs up with the agency after their lunchtime liaison. Writer/director Celine Songs romantic comedy, starring Dakota Johnson, Chris Evans and Pedro Pascal

programme.title: One More Shot (2025)
programme.desc: On New Years Eve 1999, a young woman discovers a bottle of time travelling tequila, and each shot takes her back to the start of the night. Comedy, starring Emily Browning, Aisha Dee and Sean Keenan

programme.title: Sketch (2025)
programme.desc: When a young girls sketchbook slips into a mysterious pond, her drawings burst into life. As her once-quiet town spirals into chaos, she and her divided family must come together to track down the creatures they never meant to unleash. Writer/director Seth Worleys fantasy comedy, starring Tony Hale and DArcy Carden

programme.title: Coyotes (2025)
programme.desc: Trapped in their Hollywood Hills home, a family fights for survival when caught between a raging wildfire and a pack of savage coyotes. Comedy thriller, starring Justin Long, Mila Harris and Brittany Allen

programme.title: Jurassic World: Rebirth (2025)
programme.desc: Profit-hungry pharmaceutical representative Martin Krebs contracts covert operations specialist Zora Bennett to assemble a crack team to infiltrate a forbidden island and collect the DNA of three key dinosaur species. Fantasy adventure, starring Scarlett Johansson, Mahershala Ali and Jonathan Bailey

programme.title: Bring Her Back (2025)
programme.desc: Seventeen-year-old Andy and his visually impaired younger stepsister Piper discover their father dead in the shower. Single mother Laura agrees to take in Andy and Piper until the traumatised youngster comes of age and can apply for legal guardianship of his stepsister. Hoever, when events inside Lauras home spiral out of control, Andy fears he is losing his mind. Thriller, starring Billy Barratt, Sora Wong and Sally Hawkins

programme.title: Icefall (2025)
programme.desc: A game warden captures a poacher, only to discover hes aware of the location of a plane carrying millions of dollars frozen in a lake. Thriller, starring Joel Kinnaman, Bashar Rahal, Danny Huston, and in one of his last films, Graham Greene

programme.title: Adulthood (2025)

programme.desc: Documentary following the fortunes of young MMA athletes, fighting to make it from a south London gym to the glittering home of the sport in Las Vegas

programme.title: Discovering Film
programme.desc: A profile of the American actor

programme.title: The Directors
programme.desc: A profile of brothers Joel and Ethan Coen, whose films include Millers Crossing, Fargo, The Big Lebowski , O Brother, Where Art Thou? and No Country for Old Men

programme.title: 100 Foot Wave
programme.desc: After moving his family to Montaldo in Italy for a new start, Garrett McNamara struggles to resist chasing swells in Morocco and Mavericks

programme.title: The Civil War
programme.desc: How the American Civil War became a crusade to end slavery. The year 1862 saw political fighting threaten President Lincolns administration and Union general George McClellans ill-fated campaign on the Virginia Peninsula, where his huge army met a smaller but more resourceful Confederate force. Eventually, rumours began to circulate that Europe was prepared to recognise the Confederacy

programme.title: The Sixties
programme.desc: A look back at the tense political situations that arose in the 1960s, from the Cuban Missile Crisis to the Bay of Pigs Invasion

programme.title: Mrs Robinson
programme.desc: Former president of Ireland Mary Robinson tells her story, illuminating battles for justice and equality of over half a century - on the streets, in the courts, at the ballot box, and in backroom corridors of power. This documentary follows her journey from reforming constitutional lawyer and Senator to becoming a crusading UN High Commissioner

programme.title: The Ghost of Richard Harris
programme.desc: The life and career of the Irish actor told through previously unheard tapes recorded by journalist Joe Jackson during interviews with Harris conducted over the course of 15 years

programme.title: Rorys 2025
programme.desc: A look at a momentous year for golfer Rory McIlroy, who completed a career Grand Slam when he finally ended his wait for an illustrious Green Jacket at the US Masters

programme.title: My Icon
programme.desc: The former golfer talks about her idol

programme.title: 100 Foot Wave
programme.desc: After moving his family to Montaldo in Italy for a new start, Garrett McNamara struggles to resist chasing swells in Morocco and Mavericks

programme.title: The Civil War
programme.desc: How the American Civil War became a crusade to end slavery. Eventually, rumours began to circulate that Europe was prepared to recognise the Confederacy

programme.title: Boyzone: No Matter What
programme.desc: Documentary about the boy band, featuring rare and exclusive interviews with the members, who talk candidly about how they grappled with the true cost of global fame

programme.title: Boyzone: No Matter What
programme.desc: The documentary charts the bands growing success with their first number one single. But as their popularity soars, so does the tabloid mania

programme.title: Boyzone: No Matter What
programme.sub-title: When All Is Said and Done
programme.desc: The documentary charts the bands split which came to an end when Mikey proposed a reunion. The comeback proved a huge hit - but then tragedy struck and the tabloids descended

programme.title: Fatboy Slim: Right Here, Right Now
programme.desc: Documentary about the Big Beach Boutique II free event held in 2002, when an estimated quarter of a million people turned up to the concert on Brighton beach

programme.title: Wig (2019)
programme.desc: Colourful film exploring the history and influence of Wigstock, the annual drag festival that showcases the personalities and talent that makes up the drag community

programme.title: Suited (2016)
programme.desc: From Lena Dunham, creator of HBO series Girls, comes an uplifting documentary that follows the work of a tailoring company based in Brooklyn, Bindle and Keep, that create custom-made items of clothing for members of the LGBTQ community. Looking beyond the gender binary, the company helps their gender-nonconforming and transgender clients to wear clothing that makes them look the way that they feel

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: Experts question what probes on Mars may have found over the past 40 years, asking if Nasa could be hiding proof of life on the Red Planet from the public

programme.title: Dark Marvels: Killing Machines
programme.desc: An exploration into the dark art of spy-craft, from the frankenkitty to the umbrella gun, reveals the deadliest spy weapons deployed to gather information and assassinate enemies

programme.title: Inside the Tower of London
programme.desc: Cameras follow Chris, the ancient structures Raven Master, and General Nicholas Houghton, former Chief of Defence staff and current Constable of the Tower. Plus, a look at the original document which reveals how brutally Guy Fawkes was tortured

programme.title: Cracking the Code
programme.sub-title: The Code That Won the Great War
programme.desc: How an encrypted German telegram offered the key to saving Britain in its darkest hour. A team of geniuses set about decoding the message to help win the Great War

programme.title: Mission Unexplained
programme.desc: The story of US Navy Boatswain Mate Robert Young, who witnessed a strange green fog in the Bermuda Triangle - and experienced a spiritual warning that he claims saved his life. Plus, tech sergeant Octavia Madden, who discovered her base house was haunted by the spirit of a little girl

programme.title: Full Custom Garage
programme.desc: Car builder Ian Roussel challenges his unique fabrication with projects to create custom one-of-a-kind vehicles for his clients, taking it outside the box with some vintage tin

programme.title: Worlds Most Unexplained
programme.desc: Death shall come on swift wings to him who disturbs the peace of the King so the famous inscription goes. A mysterious curse haunts the original discoverers of Tutankhamun.

programme.title: Worlds Most Unexplained
programme.desc: Investigating a strange creature seen in a wooded area of rural Massachusetts by three different people who all gave similar descriptions. Could the so-called Dover Demon be a never before discovered animal or could it have come from another civilisation?

programme.title: Evidence of the Unexplained
programme.desc: A look at the latest sightings of unexplained aerial phenomena and reports of so-called first contact moments, which are supported by credible eyewitness accounts or clear video footage. The series also examines recently released declassified evidence that casts new light on historic cases

programme.title: What on Earth?
programme.desc: Investigating unusual patterns in an English field that could be an alien message, and a secret military facility in the Nevada desert

programme.title: The Abyss: Rise and Fall of the Nazis
programme.desc: The invasion of Poland by the German army in 1939, examining how Hitler succeeded in pushing through his rearmament and war plans relatively unhindered

programme.title: Combat Trains
programme.desc: Documentary series exploring the role of trains in the major conflicts of the past 150 years. This instalment looks into how the efficiency of the rail networks on both sides helped cause the stalemate of the First World War

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: Theorists search ancient texts for proof that extraterrestrials influenced the miraculous advances made by the Sumerian civilisation 5,000 years ago

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: Giorgio Tsoukalos draws on evidence from past series as he asks whether extra-terrestrials could have introduced the Greeks and Egyptians to electricity

programme.title: Alien Files: Unsealed
programme.desc: The possibility of the existence of portals through space, which would allow people to travel vast distances in the blink of an eye

programme.title: Alien Files: Unsealed
programme.desc: The possibility of alien civilisations visiting Earths solar system, including tales of derelict spaceships

programme.title: Walking Through History
programme.desc: As the 800th anniversary of the signing of Magna Carta in June 1215 approaches, Tony Robinson sets out to discover the real King John. His walk across the medieval monarchs stamping grounds of Sherwood Forest and the Peak District reveals a hapless man stumbling from crisis to crisis who, in the end, had no choice but to sign away some of his power. In the midst of what are now cultivated fields, Tony finds the scant remains of Laxton Castle, once the control centre where strict forest law was administered and where taxes and fines flooded into the royal coffers. Later, in Sherwood, he explores how the myth of Robin Hood has helped to skew the publics image of King John

programme.title: Bone Detectives: Britains Buried Secrets
programme.desc: Tori Herridge and a team of scientists attempt to piece together the lives behind discovered bones, and find out what happened to these people and how they died. This episode comes from Leeds, where remains of children and teenagers have been uncovered beneath a shopping arcade. Analysis of the broken bones reveals that they date back to the industrial revolution, and a thorough examination of the remains provides a detailed picture of the lives these young people would have lived during a tumultuous period of British history

programme.desc: How, from bizarre ancient markings to random numbers and letters, codes and ciphers have been used for millennia to send secret messages, hide identities and operate outside the law

programme.sub-title: Where in the World Is Michael Jackson?
programme.desc: Conspiracy theories surrounding the death of Michael Jackson in June 2009. The Prince of Pops talent was matched only by his alleged salacious personal life. Is it any wonder he might try to run away, feigning death? But where could such a recognisable face hide?

programme.title: Worlds Most Unexplained
programme.desc: According to folklore, pots of gold and wishes are granted if a Leprechaun is caught. These mysterious little creatures are seemingly only found in Ireland. Alleged sightings of leprechauns and fairies are nothing new in Ireland. In fact, many claim they are part of everyday life on the Emerald Isle. Experts debate whether these Celtic creatures are fact or fiction

programme.title: Rust Valley Restorers
programme.desc: Fantasies turn to nightmares when Connor enlists Rust Bros on a personal build, Avery goes over budget on his dream truck, and James tackles a project from his past

programme.title: Worlds Most Unexplained
programme.desc: A hoard of golden coins are found in the prospecting district of California, and a similarly valuable find in an old piano in rural England

programme.desc: Thousands of UFO sightings are reported every year, along with terrifying abductions and other bizarre occurrences. This series examines these accounts and explores recently declassified top secret UFO files, casting new light on historic cases

programme.title: What on Earth?
programme.desc: The images of a cave in Iceland that could hold alien secrets. Plus, military structures in the Utah desert and a bloody stain in the sands of Saudi Arabia

programme.title: The Abyss: Rise and Fall of the Nazis
programme.desc: Hitlers invasion of the Soviet Union on June 22, 1941. His aim was to weaken Britain in Europe and gain lebensraum, or living space, in the East. The Nazi regime gradually advanced its so-called final solution to the Jewish problem culminating in the appalling events associated with the Holocaust

programme.title: Combat Trains

programme.desc: Experts explore the controversy surrounding the ancient Crystal Skulls, asking what powers might be unleashed if all 13 artefacts were brought together

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: Experts scrutinise the paintings, journals and technical drawings of Leonardo Da Vinci to establish whether they hide evidence of extra-terrestrial beings

programme.title: Alien Files: Unsealed
programme.desc: Experts question whether Nazi leader Adolf Hitler received extraterrestrial help in his quest for world domination

programme.title: Alien Files: Unsealed
programme.desc: Experts try to uncover the truth about alien remains by investigating reports of extraterrestrial bodies recovered from crashed UFOs

programme.title: Walking Through History
programme.desc: Tony Robinson hikes up from Lyme Regis on Dorsets Jurassic Coast to the Somerset Levels in the footsteps of a ragtag rebel army led by the young Duke of Monmouth, the illegitimate son of Charles II. He sailed in from Holland around Lymes famous Cobb with a handful of soldiers, believing the people would support him in overthrowing the newly crowned James II, who was also Monmouths uncle, but, more importantly, Roman Catholic. The year was 1685 and the country was riven by anti-Catholic feeling mixed up with revolutionary zeal. Monmouth marched through the fiercely independent towns of Devon, gathering support from artisans and farmworkers. Meeting up with Billy Bragg in Colyton, Tony learns about the kind of people prepared to risk their lives for the Monmouth Rebellion

programme.title: Digging for Britain
programme.desc: Alice Roberts spends a year visiting archaeological digs around the country, finding out about discoveries that shed new light on British history. In Buckinghamshire, Simon Mays and Jill Eyers use a recent rediscovery of artefacts from a 1912 excavation to investigate what appears to have been a mass infanticide during the Roman era. Alice also meets the team examining one of the largest discoveries of Roman coins ever made in Britain, and hears about a mystery in Dorset

programme.desc: A hoard of golden coins are found in the prospecting district of California, and a similarly valuable find in an old piano in rural England
