programme.title: Worlds Most Unexplained
programme.desc: The mysterious phone call from an apparently middle-aged woman who predicted the murder of President John F Kennedy. On November 22 1963, a telephone operator in California answered a call that stated that the President was going to die. This came some hours before Lee Harvey Oswald unleashed his fire

programme.title: Mysteries Unearthed with Danny Trejo
programme.desc: From Nazi bunkers buried in sand and a supernova caught on camera. These discoveries prove historys blasts from the past can shake our world today

programme.title: The UnBelievable with Dan Aykroyd
programme.desc: History is full of legendary missions, some so bizarre that they sound like fiction. From a covert operation involving toilet paper to a war sparked by a tree

programme.title: Secrets in the Ice
programme.desc: Preserved in the ice of Mexicos highest peak, a group of climbers stumbles upon the bizarre, mummified remains of a man in a pinstripe business suit. Experts uncover possible drug cartel connections and a plane crash shrouded in secrecy

programme.title: Secrets in the Ice
programme.desc: A salvage team discovers the mysterious remains of an enormous shipwreck near Cambridge Bay in the icy waters of the Canadian Arctic. Experts investigate and uncover a cutting-edge vessel with links to one of the greatest polar explorers in history

programme.title: Secrets in the Ice
programme.desc: Mountain climbers in California find the body of a US Army soldier, strange bundles of canvas and wood are discovered on an Alaskan mountain and volcanic glass is found in an unexpected place. A vital Second World War weather station is uncovered

programme.title: Killer Kings
programme.desc: The case against six formidable kings who have left an indelible mark on the world and a look at new evidence that could lead to the world looking at them in a different light. First, a look at the reign of Henry VIII, remembered for his six marriages, the brutal treatment of his spouses and separating the Church of England from papal authority

programme.title: Rust Valley Restorers
programme.desc: Mike and Avery try to get an auctioneer to help them downsize their collections, but Avery scares him off. Frame issues leave Mikes restoration of a Diamond T truck dead in the water

programme.title: Death Coast
programme.desc: Jeff MacKinnons team searches Scatarie Island for the Fevershams lost fortune. Battling brutal currents, they uncover artifacts that may lead to treasure. The clues push them closer to the deadly shores that have claimed countless lives for centuries

programme.title: Death Coast
programme.sub-title: Into the Eye of the Storm
programme.desc: Jeff MacKinnons team battles thick kelp, brutal currents and a looming storm while searching Scatarie Islands coast. Just as the storm hits, they make a crucial discovery - a clue that could lead to the long-lost wrecks and hidden treasure

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: The staff examine items signed by President Franklin D Roosevelt, as well as a rare photograph taken during baseball star Babe Ruths debut season

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Rick checks out a 1939 Superman doll, while Corey has a jam on a 1952 Fender Telecaster

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: The women from Vegas meet Dave, who promptly takes their locker away, leaving them only scraps. Kenny uses Mary as a Dave shield and the two find a decent unit of their own

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: The Vegas women try their own bidding style, Brandi and Jarrod try to phone it in and Kenny and his brother show everyone that family comes second

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Rene steals the units in Rancho Palos Verdes, California, Marys locker reveals a sticky past and Justin demonstrates he can turn a small investment into a big return

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Emily deals with an all-male day, while Justin seeks Ivys guidance with his vintage Cadillac parts. Kenny speaks up during the auction - and quickly regrets it

programme.title: Digging for Britain
programme.sub-title: Anglo Saxon Gold and Rebellious Nuns
programme.desc: Alice Roberts joins archaeologists to explore Central Englands past. She explores a dig beneath the runways of RAF Alconbury, which has uncovered a rural Roman site filled with mysteriously placed objects. In Winchester she visits a new housing development where an Anglo-Saxon cemetery has been discovered and a gold pendant has been found in a grave. She also tours a medieval nunnery near Windsor where archaeologists are attempting to learn about the women who lived within the convent

programme.title: Great British Castle Rescue
programme.desc: Rick Edwards takes an aerial and up-close view of Gwrych Castle in Conwy County Borough, Wales

programme.title: Secrets of Great British Castles
programme.desc: Perched high on a volcanic crag overlooking the River Forth, Stirling has long been one of the most strategically important castles in Britain. Guarding the gateway to the Highlands, its battle-scarred walls have witnessed savagery and chivalry, intrigue, alchemy, adultery and murder. With the aid of location filming, aerial shots and dramatic reconstructions, Dan Jones examines the history of this stronghold and relates the stories of some of the powerful characters who have owned it over the centuries

programme.title: Secrets of Great British Castles
programme.desc: Dan Jones explores the history of Carrickfergus Castle in Co Antrim, one of the most ancient castles in Northern Ireland and a stronghold key to understanding the tempestuous relationship between Britain and Ireland. Dan travels to Rathlin island, where he reveals how hundreds of women and children were massacred in the name of Elizabeth I, and visits the tomb of former governor Arthur Chichester, who began a new colonisation strategy using scorched earth tactics and laid waste to much of the land surrounding the town

programme.title: Secrets of Great British Castles
programme.desc: Dan Jones explores the turbulent history of six of Britains most famous castles, his journey commencing with a visit to Edinburgh Castle. A popular tourist attraction to this day, Dan explores the history of this famous stronghold that began as an Iron Age battle base and remains a military facility to this day, and was the target of the worlds first aerial bombing

programme.title: Secrets of Great British Castles
programme.desc: Dan Jones explores the history of the Welsh capitals landmark, Cardiff Castle, and discovers more about its various incarnations over the centuries. Dan learns about the many famous figures throughout history who have spent time within its walls, and discovers more about its redevelopment in the 19th century by architect William Burges, who transformed it into the Victorian gothic fantasy it remains today

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Following two of Americas most skilled pickers, who trawl junk yards, garages, attics and barns for precious objects

programme.title: Forged in Fire
programme.desc: Four bladesmiths are tasked with recreating an iconic fighting knife from the 20th century - the Fairbairn Sykes. However, replicating the blade is only half the challenge as they must also combine three different sizes of W1 round stock to forge their weapon. Later, two smiths then forge Japanese General Yamashitas gunto

programme.title: Historys Most Shocking
programme.sub-title: Sucked Up by a Tornado, Elevators Gone Wrong, Motorcycle v Flood and the Indian Ocean Tsunami of 200
programme.desc: Tony Harris breaks down the most shocking moments ever captured on camera. programme.title: Digging for Britain
programme.desc: Alice Roberts spends a year visiting archaeological digs around the country, finding out about discoveries that shed new light on British history. programme.sub-title: Conspiracy or Confusion? The Duke of Kent
programme.desc: The documentary concludes with a look at the air event that ended the life of Prince George the Duke of Kent in Scotland in 1942, questioning whether his death was an accident or whether foul play was involved. Presenter Garth Barnard examines claims that the royals Nazi sympathies and scandals in his personal life could have been reasons to have him killed off, despite the authorities insisting the Short Sunderland Flying Boat crashed due to pilot error

programme.title: After the Wildfires
programme.desc: In 2020, Australia went up in flames. The scale and intensity signified an undeniable new phase in the global climate crisis. For Australias wildlife, who have adapted to severities of weather, it was cataclysmic. And for those who did survive, the real challenge only now begins. This documentary examines the toll, the recovery and the healing of the wild after Australias wildfires

programme.title: Beverly Hills Cop III (1994)
programme.desc: Maverick cop Axel Foley returns to Los Angeles when an investigation into a colleagues murder leads him to a Hollywood theme park. He enlists the help of old ally Rosewood to prove the resort is a cover for a major counterfeiting ring connected to a terrorist conspiracy. Comedy adventure sequel, starring Eddie Murphy, Judge Reinhold, Theresa Randle and Bronson Pinchot.

programme.title: Pretty in Pink (1986)
programme.desc: Misfit high-school girl Andie Walsh unexpectedly attracts the attentions of a rich, popular boy, but the course of true love runs far from smoothly when their two worlds collide. Romantic drama, starring Molly Ringwald, Andrew McCarthy, James Spader, Jon Cryer and Harry Dean Stanton

programme.title: The First Wives Club (1996)
programme.desc: Three former college friends reunite at the funeral of a mutual acquaintance, who killed herself after her husband left her for a younger woman. Finding themselves in a similar situation, the trio decide to take action and hit their former partners where it hurts most - their finances. Comedy, starring Goldie Hawn, Bette Midler, Diane Keaton, Maggie Smith, Dan Hedaya, Bronson Pinchot and Elizabeth Berkley

programme.title: Hope Springs (2012)
programme.desc: A middle-aged married woman feels her long-standing relationship with her unadventurous husband is becoming stale. When she hears of a marriage counsellor offering therapy sessions in his remote retreat, she persuades her reluctant spouse to join her for a week with the doctor rediscovering why they fell in love in the first place. Romantic comedy, with Meryl Streep, Tommy Lee Jones and Steve Carell

programme.title: Arthur (1981)
programme.desc: Boozy playboy Arthur Bach is content to drift through life without ambition and await the multimillion-dollar inheritance due to him following an arranged high-society wedding. However, on the threshold of the nuptials, Arthur falls for a penniless shoplifter and begins to doubt whether he wants to go through with the ceremony. Comedy, starring Dudley Moore, Liza Minnelli and an Oscar-winning John Gielgud

programme.title: The Sweetest Thing (2002)
programme.desc: A woman more interested in one-night stands than true love is forced to reassess her priorities after meeting the man of her dreams. However, when she hears he is getting married, she sets out on a hectic road trip across America to stop the wedding. Romantic comedy, starring Cameron Diaz, Christina Applegate, Selma Blair and Thomas Jane

programme.title: Tootsie (1982)
programme.desc: A New York actors difficult reputation has rendered him unemployable. When a TV soap advertises a new female role, he disguises himself as a woman for the audition - and wins the part. But the character proves so popular, he is forced to keep up the pretence indefinitely. Comedy, starring Dustin Hoffman, Jessica Lange and Bill Murray. Directed by Sydney Pollack, who makes a cameo appearance as Hoffmans agent

programme.title: Pretty in Pink (1986)

programme.title: Two Weeks Notice (2002)
programme.desc: An idealistic lawyer catches the attention of a real-estate tycoon, who offers her a job. She starts out thinking she can change his venal ways, but quickly tires of running his life for him. Finding himself in desperate need of her support, the self-absorbed millionaire pulls out all the stops to win her back. Romantic comedy, starring Sandra Bullock, Hugh Grant, Alicia Witt and Dana Ivey

programme.title: Lost in Translation (2003)
programme.desc: A lonely and past-his-prime American actor travels to Japan to film a commercial. During a depressing night in the hotel bar, he meets a spirited younger woman and the pair strike up a close friendship, exploring Tokyo and helping each other face the mundanities of everyday life. Sofia Coppolas comedy drama, starring Bill Murray, Scarlett Johansson and Giovanni Ribisi

programme.title: Bye Bye Birdie (1963)
programme.desc: A songwriter tries to organise a farewell performance for a popular rock n roll singer who is about to be drafted into the US army. The event takes place in a small town, where the writer has to contend with a gaggle of screaming fans and his own domineering mother. Musical, starring Dick Van Dyke, Jesse Pearson, Janet Leigh and Ann-Margret

programme.title: The Wedding Banquet (2025)
programme.desc: A gay man makes a deal with his lesbian friend - a green-card marriage for him, in exchange for in vitro fertilisation treatments for her. Romantic comedy, starring Bowen Yang, Lily Gladstone and Kelly Marie Tran

programme.title: Finding Your Feet (2017)
programme.desc: A wealthy womans privileged existence is shattered when she discovers her husband is having an affair with her best friend. Seeking solace, she turns to her estranged sister, who lives in a London council estate, and finds a new lease of life in joining her community dance class. Comedy, starring Imelda Staunton, Celia Imrie, Timothy Spall and Joanna Lumley

programme.title: So I Married an Axe Murderer (1993)
programme.desc: A poet has a history of ruining relationships owing to his paranoia, but when he meets the woman of his dreams, he resolves to make this romance last. However, as their wedding day approaches, he becomes convinced she is a notorious serial killer the police are hunting for. Comedy, starring Mike Myers and Nancy Travis

programme.title: Mamma Mia! (2008)
programme.desc: A former member of a singing trio, now running a hotel on a Greek island, is reunited with her old bandmates for her daughters wedding - but is surprised when three of her old flames also show up unexpectedly. The three men have been invited by the bride, who wants to find out which one of them is her father. Musical comedy, with a soundtrack of Abba songs, starring Meryl Streep, Pierce Brosnan, Julie Walters, Colin Firth, Stellan Skarsgard and Amanda Seyfried

programme.title: The Holiday (2006)
programme.desc: Two single women living on opposite sides of the Atlantic agree to exchange houses over the Christmas holidays. In their new surroundings, both women unexpectedly encounter prospective partners, but as the house swap draws to a close, difficult decisions have to be made about their blossoming relationships. Romantic comedy, starring Cameron Diaz, Kate Winslet, Jack Black, Jude Law and Eli Wallach

programme.title: Miss Congeniality (2000)
programme.desc: A feminist FBI agent is sent undercover as a contestant in the Miss United States pageant when the event becomes the target of a terrorist bomb threat. As she is not exactly catwalk material, a veteran British coach is brought on board to oversee her transformation into a glamorous beauty queen. Comedy, starring Sandra Bullock, Michael Caine, Benjamin Bratt, Candice Bergen and William Shatner

programme.title: Miss Congeniality 2: Armed and Fabulous (2005)
programme.desc: FBI agent Gracie Hart is taken off active duty and made the face of the bureaus publicity campaign, but would rather catch crooks than be the focus of media attention - so when her friends are kidnapped, she disobeys orders to run her own undercover investigation with the help of a short-tempered colleague. Comedy sequel, starring Sandra Bullock, Regina King, William Shatner and Heather Burns

programme.desc: A man is abducted and locked away in a small room for 15 years then suddenly set free, with no explanation for why he was incarcerated. Bewildered and disorientated, he struggles to adapt to his new-found freedom, but vows to find out what has become of his family and who his captors were so he can mete out his own brand of revenge. Thriller, directed by Park Chan-wook, starring Choi Min-sik, Gang Hye-jung and Yu Ji-tae. In Korean

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Amy is hurt to discover Penny and Bernadette went shopping for bridesmaid dresses without her. She first turns to a reluctant Sheldon for comfort and later tries to drown her sorrows. Comedy, starring Mayim Bialik and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: Mike and Molly
programme.desc: The couple go to the opera, but Mike fails to enjoy himself due to a cold. With her sweetheart bed-ridden, Molly decides to play nursemaid, but ends up coming into conflict with her patients mother, who does not appear to appreciate having her role as carer usurped

programme.title: Mike and Molly
programme.desc: Vince tries to strike up a friendship with Mike by inviting him to a crucial basketball game, but Molly is not impressed by their new-found bond

programme.title: Mike and Molly

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.sub-title: A Race of Superhumans and a Letter to Alf
programme.desc: Missy unknowingly becomes Sheldons test subject when he agrees to help her with her maths homework, while Georgie joins Marys bible study group to spend more time with a girl he has his eye on

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.sub-title: A Tummy Ache and a Whale of a Metaphor
programme.desc: When Sheldon becomes ill and spends a few days in hospital, he turns into the worlds worst patient. His behaviour takes a toll on everyone, and Missy gets a taste of what her life would be like if she didnt have a twin

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.sub-title: A Nuclear Reactor and a Boy Called Lovey
programme.desc: The young genius tries to build a nuclear reactor to power the neighbourhood. A university cocktail party gets heated when Dr Sturgis colleague, Dr Linkletter, flirts with Meemaw, and Georgie is heartbroken when he learns Veronica has a boyfriend

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard and Penny endure an awkward night at the cinema, both insisting the outing is not a date. Comedy, starring Johnny Gale, Kaley Cuoco and Jim Parsons

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Comic-book store owner Stuart asks Amy out on a date, forcing a jealous Sheldon to consider the future of his relationship with her. Meanwhile, the scientists become obsessed with an unusual new card game, and Penny organises a round of Twister. Comedy, starring Jim Parsons and Mayim Bialik

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard confronts the man who tormented him in high school, while Penny realises she did her fair share of bullying in the past and calls the people she targeted to apologise. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon is uninterested in Amys career, so Penny, Raj and Leonard try to make him understand that sometimes it benefits a relationship to pretend to care about a partners achievements. Howard notices Bernadette is uncomfortable around children when she helps him perform a magic show at his nephews birthday party

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard asks Penny out on a date, and they agree to give their relationship another chance. They soon remember why it did not work out in the first place, but end up sleeping together anyway. The 100th episode of the comedy, starring Johnny Galecki and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard and Penny continue testing their rekindled relationship using an innovative system to report discrepancies. Howard and Bernadette begin to worry when Raj starts treating his new phone like a person, while Sheldon and Amy try to achieve internet fame by creating a video podcast about flags

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: After a sleepless night, Leonard breaks his room-mate agreement with Sheldon. Howard makes preparations to go on a flight to the International Space Station and enlists Rajs help to ensure he gets a cool astronaut nickname

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon uses his holidays to help Amy in her biology lab, but moans about the menial jobs he is given - until she asks him to dissect a brain. Penny grows curious about Leonards attitude to marriage when Bernadette asks Howard to sign a pre-nuptial agreement

programme.title: Mock the Week
programme.desc: Dara Ó Briain is joined by guests Rhys James, Alasdair Beckett-King, Ed Byrne, Hugh Dennis and Ellie Taylor to comedically examine the weeks events

programme.title: Beverly Hills Cop (1984)
programme.desc: Fast-talking Detroit cop Axel Foley heads for Los Angeles after an old friend is murdered before his eyes. His search for the killers leads him into conflict with a seemingly untouchable drug kingpin, but he also has to contend with the local force, who do not want him taking matters into his own hands. Comedy thriller, starring Eddie Murphy, Judge Reinhold, Ronny Cox, John Ashton and Steven Berkoff

programme.title: Dr Pimple Popper
programme.desc: Leonard has a bump hanging off his arm that looks like it is going to break through his skin. Jess has a visible lump on her rear after falling down stairs

programme.title: Dr Pimple Popper
programme.desc: Doctor Sandra Lee treats Heather, who has a huge growth on her leg and fears removing it could leave a keloid scar. Elsewhere, patient Paul has a giant hump on his back

programme.title: My 600lb Life
programme.desc: Forty four-year-old Erica binges on food when faced with adversity, and previous weight-loss surgery was unsuccessful. Can she get the support she needs to change her habits?

programme.title: My 600lb Life

programme.desc: Fast-talking Detroit cop Axel Foley heads for Los Angeles after an old friend is murdered before his eyes. His search for the killers leads him into conflict with a seemingly untouchable drug kingpin, but he also has to contend with the local force, who do not want him taking matters into his own hands. Comedy thriller, starring Eddie Murphy, Judge Reinhold, Ronny Cox, John Ashton and Steven Berkoff

programme.title: Dr Pimple Popper
programme.desc: Leonard has a bump hanging off his arm that looks like it is going to break through his skin. Jess has a visible lump on her rear after falling down stairs

programme.title: Dr Pimple Popper
programme.desc: Doctor Sandra Lee treats Heather, who has a huge growth on her leg and fears removing it could leave a keloid scar. Elsewhere, patient Paul has a giant hump on his back

programme.title: My 600lb Life
programme.desc: Forty four-year-old Erica binges on food when faced with adversity, and previous weight-loss surgery was unsuccessful. Can she get the support she needs to change her habits?

programme.title: My 600lb Life
programme.desc: Diana is a prisoner to her 620lb-body. Desperate to break free of her food addiction, she embarks on a weight loss journey, hoping to keep her food addiction in check, in order to regain control of her life

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: UK
programme.desc: Rule-breaking brides visit Confetti and Lace, as blue-haired bride Stephanie wants a dress with colour and Virginia brings her fiance to help choose a gown

programme.title: Battle of Britain: Empty Skies
programme.desc: A unique insight into what it was really like to be there. Interviews with the pilots, cut with archive footage paint the picture of one of historys greatest ever air battles

programme.title: Queer Lives Today
programme.desc: Following a painful adoption journey which comes to an abrupt halt, Hollyoaks star Ross Adams explores what can be done to make the system easier for LGBTQ+ adopters.

For her £3,000 budget, Debbie would like to share her garden with as much wildlife as possible and would also love a natural pond

programme.title: Becoming Jazzy Whipps
programme.desc: Jazzy Whipps is the UKs biggest deaf influencer - but success brings trolling. It takes courage and resilience to be Jazzy. Funded and supported by Together TV and BSLBT.

programme.title: New Home DIY
programme.desc: Dave Wellman is in Ramsgate restoring a period property - a masterclass in timber cladding is on

programme.title: Edwardian Farm
programme.desc: To mark the half-way point of their sociological experiment, Alex Langlands, Peter Ginn and Ruth Goodman explore a single day in an Edwardian farmers household. Using a cache of letters from the time found in Morwhellham to research the realities of life, the trio experience typical daily routines, from the usual early morning hair-styling and oral hygiene, to the end-of-the-day trip to the local pub

programme.title: Country House Auction
programme.desc: Egyptologist Dr Chris gets his hands on an inscribed Egyptian amulet and gives trainee auctioneer James a masterclass in ancient signs and symbols. A historical silver pin cushion, which was once owned by a leading lady of the Irish Arts and Crafts movement, piques the interest of competing buyers. Plus, auctioneer James gets up close and personal with the inner workings of some valuable watches

programme.title: How to Have a Better Orgasm
programme.desc: Seven women give intimate interviews about their diverse experience of orgasms, sharing a variety of stories and techniques covering a range of ages. Personal accounts reveal that, across the board, theres a turning point in understanding orgasms and learning how to have a better one. For Helen, it was her first experience of lesbian sex, which made her realise how important communication is to sex, while Sam attributes it to meeting her husband, because it was the first time someone cared about her pleasure

programme.title: The Inglorious Bastards (1978)
programme.desc: Four American soldiers being transported to military prison through Nazi-occupied France escape when their convoy is attacked. Initially planning to escape to neutral Switzerland, they end up helping the French resistance steal a V2 rocket. Second World War thriller, starring Bo Svenson and Peter Hooten and Fred Williamson.

programme.title: Edwardian Farm
programme.desc: Spring sees the daffodil harvest, accompanied by a rush to get the flowers off to the train station so they can be delivered to towns and cities across the country within hours of being picked. Alex Langlands and Peter Ginn go to Dartmoor for the annual pony trek, and use the occasion to purchase one of the beasts for the farm. However, before their new pony is fit for work, he needs to be trained, and the farmers hire American horse whisperer Mike Branch for the job. Meanwhile, the arrival of new lambs is followed by a pleasant surprise for Ruth Goodman in the run-up to Mothers Day

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: As the Kembleford Amateur Dramatics Society prepares to put on a pantomime, a grim incident from the groups past is unearthed. A body is found in the woods and identified as a woman who went missing from a rehearsal seven years previously. An examination of the corpse provides evidence that a man who confessed to the murder was innocent, leaving Father Brown with a miscarriage of justice to put right in time for Christmas. Crime drama, starring Mark Williams

programme.title: The Mentalist
programme.desc: When a star witness in a high-profile narcotics case is murdered, the CBI team concludes the killing was the work of the drug baron he was about to testify against. However, Jane concocts an alternative theory, one that suggests the real target of the hit was the witnesss girlfriend - also found dead at the scene - whose dubious connections to local police officers suggest corruption within the force. Simon Baker stars

programme.title: Hudson and Rex
programme.desc: A viral confrontation between a murder writer and the wife of a victim leads to a seven-year-old cold case being reopened, and Rex finds previously overlooked evidence

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: Famous thriller author Frank OToole is found stabbed through the heart after taking an early morning swim in the ocean. Suspicion soon falls on the victims wife Valerie, but with eyewitnesses confirming he was swimming alone, how could anyone have got from the house to the sea without being detected? Away from the investigation, Dwayne concentrates on finding a date for a voodoo love festival. Whodunit, guest starring Simon Callow, Imogen Stubbs, and Sian Gibson of Car Share fame

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: Murdoch quickly realises that the boy who tried to avenge Annas murder is his son. Ogden is stunned but eager to accept the boy out of love for Murdoch

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: As the Kembleford Amateur Dramatics Society prepares to put on a pantomime, a grim incident from the groups past is unearthed. A body is found in the woods and identified as a woman who went missing from a rehearsal seven years previously. An examination of the corpse provides evidence that a man who confessed to the murder was innocent, leaving Father Brown with a miscarriage of justice to put right in time for Christmas. Crime drama, starring Mark Williams

programme.title: The Mentalist
programme.desc: When a star witness in a high-profile narcotics case is murdered, the CBI team concludes the killing was the work of the drug baron he was about to testify against. However, Jane concocts an alternative theory, one that suggests the real target of the hit was the witnesss girlfriend - also found dead at the scene - whose dubious connections to local police officers suggest corruption within the force. Simon Baker stars

programme.title: Hudson and Rex
programme.desc: A viral confrontation between a murder writer and the wife of a victim leads to a seven-year-old cold case being reopened, and Rex finds previously overlooked evidence

programme.title: My Life Is Murder

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: Famous thriller author Frank OToole is found stabbed through the heart after taking an early morning swim in the ocean. Suspicion soon falls on the victims wife Valerie, but with eyewitnesses confirming he was swimming alone, how could anyone have got from the house to the sea without being detected? Away from the investigation, Dwayne concentrates on finding a date for a voodoo love festival. Whodunit, guest starring Simon Callow, Imogen Stubbs, and Sian Gibson of Car Share fame

programme.title: Guy Martin: Proper Jobs
programme.desc: Documentary series in which Guy Martin gets stuck into doing some of the most demanding and often dangerous jobs in the UK. programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson gets behind the wheel of a Reliant Robin to investigate the reasons behind the lack of three-wheeled cars on the market. programme.title: Upstairs Downstairs
programme.sub-title: A Faraway Country About Which We Know Nothing
programme.desc: Drama and intrigue with the aristocrats and serving staff of 165 Eaton Place as it opens its doors once more. September 1938, and as dark clouds gather over Europe, Hallams preoccupation with Nazi Germany leads him into dangerous waters overseas. Back home, Lady Agnes is frail following the birth of her second child, and finds great support in the forthright Aunt Blanche, who has made herself comfortable at Eaton Place following the funeral of her sister Lady Holland. In the servants quarters, Rose is taken ill with TB, so the staff welcome spirited new maid Beryl, who catches Harrys eye, while events upstairs end in a startling revelation about Mr Pritchard. Keeley Hawes, Ed Stoppard, Alex Kingston and Adrian Scarborough star

programme.title: Upstairs Downstairs
programme.sub-title: The Love That Pays the Price
programme.desc: Lady Agnes distracts herself from her bad news by throwing a dinner party, where she catches the eye of charismatic American millionaire Casper Landry - and it is clear the attraction is mutual. But the festivities are interrupted by news of the Nazis going on the rampage in Germany, leaving many Jews dead and Lady Persie needing a safe passage home, forcing the family to pull together and do its best to help. Meanwhile, Mrs Thackeray has one too many arguments with Mr Pritchard, prompting her to make a momentous decision that throws the running of the house into chaos

programme.title: Upstairs Downstairs
programme.desc: The house is rocked by controversy when the publication of a scandalous novel exposes Blanches unconventional lifestyle, bringing the doctor face to face with the author of the book and her former lover Lady Portia Alresford. But when the passion between the pair reignites, the doctor becomes conflicted. Meanwhile, Persie reveals a shocking secret to Hallam, and Beryls workload prompts her to take a stand - until a familiar old face appears to offer a few wise words. Emilia Fox guest stars, with Alex Kingston, Jean Marsh, Ed Stoppard and Claire Foy

programme.title: Bottom Live: The Big Number 2 Tour
programme.desc: Stage show of the comedy series from 1995, in which Richie and Eddie try to invite the Queen for supper. Starring Rik Mayall and Adrian Edmondson

programme.title: Bottom
programme.desc: The grubby duo steal a car and discover the tickets for the unfortunate owners honeymoon inside. Taking advantage of their find, they try to pass themselves off as the happy couple, but needless to say, the whole trip soon becomes a nightmare

programme.title: Bottom
programme.desc: Richie prepares for his birthday celebration - but suffers an accident while putting up the decorations and breaks his leg. Only Eddies mates Spudgun and Dave Hedgehog show up at the party and it dawns on Richie that he has no real friends. Anarchic comedy, starring Rik Mayell and Adrian Edmondson

programme.title: The Vicar of Dibley
programme.desc: Geraldines hopes of romance are fuelled by a visit from Davids handsome brother, while the Hortons return from honeymoon with a souvenir they had not bargained for - Alice is pregnant. The only problem is, she doesnt know it yet. Clerical comedy, starring Dawn French and Emma Chambers. From Christmas Eve 1999

programme.title: Dont Wait Up
programme.desc: Tom is excited about returning to his old flat, making Angela think about the implications of Toby having his own place. Nigel Havers and Tony Britton star

programme.title: Porridge
programme.desc: Betting fever sweeps Slade Prison, but the stakes rise too high for some of the inmates, stretching honour among thieves to the limit. Vintage comedy, starring Ronnie Barker and Richard Beckinsale

programme.title: The Green Green Grass

programme.title: Im Alan Partridge
programme.desc: Despite being reduced to living in a roadside motel and presenting an early-morning programme on Radio Norwich, Alan still dreams of launching a new show on the BBC. However, his meeting with chief commissioner Tony Hayers does not run smoothly. Comedy, starring Steve Coogan

programme.title: Im Alan Partridge
programme.desc: Alans fortunes take a turn for the better as he lands a TV job presenting military-based quiz show Skirmish for a cable channel. He also carries on his work for Radio Norwich, acquires a Ukrainian girlfriend and moves into a large caravan while his new home is built. Comedy, starring Steve Coogan

programme.title: Men Behaving Badly
programme.desc: Tony continues his fruitless attempts to impress Deborah, this time giving himself a DIY tattoo to win her approval. Gary faces an agonising crisis of loyalty, having to decide who is more important - his girlfriend or his best mate. Comedy, starring Martin Clunes, Neil Morrissey, Leslie Ash and Caroline Quentin

programme.title: Live at the Apollo
programme.sub-title: Danny Bhoy, Miles Jupp and Lee Nelson
programme.desc: Danny Bhoy hosts an evening of stand-up at the Apollo in Hammersmith, London, warming up the audience before introducing routines by actor-comedian Miles Jupp and happy-go-lucky chancer Lee Nelson, aka Simon Brodkin

programme.title: The Green Green Grass
programme.desc: Animal rights activists target the village, with Llewellyn falling victim to a paint bomb and the pub coming under threat, so Boycie organises patrol groups to protect Winderdown farm from attack. Meanwhile, Tyler wants to borrow money to buy equipment for his band, but Boycie refuses until his son completes a task to prove his business acumen

programme.title: Are You Being Served?
programme.desc: Captain Peacock becomes infatuated with another woman and the staff rally round to conceal the fact from his wife. However, his willingness to go to extreme measures to solve his problem takes Mr Humphries breath away. Comedy, starring Frank Thornton and John Inman

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine
programme.sub-title: Yours Truly - If Youre Not Careful
programme.desc: Billy and Alvin learn that Trulys ex-wife is trying to find him, and waste no time in gleefully tormenting their pal with the news of a strange womans appearance in town. Long-running comedy, starring Peter Sallis and Frank Thornton

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine
programme.desc: Clegg, Truly, Alvin and Billy encounter a stranger who is determined to travel by canal to Ilkley in an inflatable swan. However, when punctures disrupt the mans dream, Entwistle is on hand to ensure the voyage goes to plan. Tommy Cannon and Bobby Ball guest star

programme.title: This Time with Alan Partridge

Comedy, starring Steve Coogan, with Susannah Fielding, Felicity Montagu and Tim Key

programme.title: Im Alan Partridge
programme.desc: Alan accepts a large sum of money to host a corporate sales conference, but an incident at the country club prevents the event running smoothly. programme.title: Men Behaving Badly
programme.desc: A holiday in a small caravan cramps the two couples style as Tony cannot believe Deborah is not faking her enthusiasm for sex, while Dorothy has to put up with Garys moods when he pretends to give up smoking. Comedy, starring Martin Clunes, Neil Morrissey, Caroline Quentin and Leslie Ash

programme.desc: Richie prepares for his birthday celebration - but suffers an accident while putting up the decorations and breaks his leg. programme.desc: Captain Mainwaring and his platoon take part in a gruelling efficiency test in a bid to prove their worth, but end up mistakenly attacking a tea lady with onions from Joness van. Classic comedy first shown in 1973, guest starring Fulton Mackay (Porridge)

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine
programme.sub-title: Yours Truly - If Youre Not Careful
programme.desc: Billy and Alvin learn that Trulys ex-wife is trying to find him, and waste no time in gleefully tormenting their pal with the news of a strange womans appearance in town. Long-running comedy, starring Peter Sallis and Frank Thornton

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine
programme.desc: Clegg, Truly, Alvin and Billy encounter a stranger who is determined to travel by canal to Ilkley in an inflatable swan. However, when punctures disrupt the mans dream, Entwistle is on hand to ensure the voyage goes to plan. Tommy Cannon and Bobby Ball guest star

programme.title: Keeping Up Appearances
programme.desc: Hyacinth dreads the idea of attending Onslows birthday celebrations. However, she changes her mind when she learns a limousine will be arriving to take her to the party. Starring Patricia Routledge, Clive Swift and Geoffrey Hughes

programme.title: Porridge
programme.desc: Fletcher helps cellmate Godber make it through the night, calling on his unpredictable and limitless imagination to while away the hours. Classic comedy, starring Ronnie Barker and Richard Beckinsale

programme.title: Dads Army
programme.desc: Sergeant Wilson inherits a title following the death of an elderly relative and joins the aristocracy - much to Mainwarings annoyance. Classic comedy first aired in 1973, starring John Le Mesurier and Arthur Lowe

programme.title: Are You Being Served?
programme.desc: Captain Peacock becomes infatuated with another woman and the staff rally round to conceal the fact from his wife. However, his willingness to go to extreme measures to solve his problem takes Mr Humphries breath away. Comedy, starring Frank Thornton and John Inman

programme.title: This Time with Alan Partridge
programme.desc: Due to the sudden illness of regular co-host of BBC One magazine show This Time, broadcaster Alan Partridge makes his long-awaited return to prime time TV when he is asked to stand in as guest presenter. Comedy, starring Steve Coogan, with Susannah Fielding, Felicity Montagu and Tim Key

programme.title: Im Alan Partridge
programme.desc: Alan accepts a large sum of money to host a corporate sales conference, but an incident at the country club prevents the event running smoothly. Sonja designs some special pottery for the love of her life, and Lynn falls out with Michael over his dubious habits. Starring Steve Coogan

programme.title: Men Behaving Badly
programme.desc: A holiday in a small caravan cramps the two couples style as Tony cannot believe Deborah is not faking her enthusiasm for sex, while Dorothy has to put up with Garys moods when he pretends to give up smoking. Comedy, starring Martin Clunes, Neil Morrissey, Caroline Quentin and Leslie Ash

programme.title: Harry Enfields Television Programme
programme.desc: Classic sketch show featuring the many guises of Harry Enfield, Paul Whitehouse and Kathy Burke, including Smashie and Nicey, Kevin the Teenager, and The Slobs

programme.title: Hi-de-Hi!
programme.desc: Spikes prospective father-in-law decides it would be a good idea if he were to join the family business. Comedy, starring Paul Shane and Jeffrey Holland

programme.title: Harry Enfields Television Programme
programme.desc: Classic sketch show featuring the many guises of Harry Enfield, Paul Whitehouse and Kathy Burke, including Smashie and Nicey, Kevin the Teenager, and The Slobs

programme.title: Dont Wait Up
programme.desc: Toby and Angela celebrate their reconciliation with a holiday in Portugal, while Tom concentrates on his future with Madeline. Comedy, starring Nigel Havers and Tony Britton

programme.title: The Green Green Grass
programme.desc: Animal rights activists target the village, with Llewellyn falling victim to a paint bomb and the pub coming under threat, so Boycie organises patrol groups to protect Winderdown farm from attack. Meanwhile, Tyler wants to borrow money to buy equipment for his band, but Boycie refuses until his son completes a task to prove his business acumen

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Bad Girls Behind Bars
programme.desc: An intimate look at life for women in the Western Massachusetts Regional Womens Correctional Centre. Cameras follow notorious gang member Baby D, who considers herself to be the prisons most powerful inmate, and has her sights set on a woman in a rival gang for her next attack. Pregnant Vanessa arrives, and after losing custody of her other children, she is desperate to secure a place on a drug rehabilitation programme. Will she get out of prison before the birth?

programme.title: Dangerous Breed: Crime. Cons. Cats.
programme.desc: With Samanthas family desperate for news, Teddy answers Fredericks questions. As new information comes to light, one of Teddys ex-students speaks up

programme.title: Brit Cops Down Under
programme.desc: Seven UK police officers make the momentous decision to uproot their lives and move to the other side of the world to become Western Australian cops. The first wave of new recruits make the mammoth journey from the UK to Australia - including young mum Anna Miller, her husband and three kids - and grapple with life down under

programme.title: Brit Cops Down Under
programme.desc: Ben works his first day at Perth station, which coincides with Christmas Day. Annas family celebrate Christmas at the beach while she sees in the New Year on the beat

programme.title: MasterChef Australia
programme.desc: For this family Mystery Box challenge, the cooks have 75 minutes to recreate a dish chosen by their family

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Ben Shephard hosts the quiz in which contestants answer questions to win turns on an arcade-style machine. Dropping tokens down a choice of four chutes, they hope to knock piles of them off a moving shelf - and the more they collect, the greater the prize fund. The player who has won the least amount is then eliminated, and the last one standing competes for a £10,000 jackpot

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon OBrien hope a clay pigeon trap, a searchlight and a Peugeot 205 will help make a profit for their owners

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: Nick Knowles heads to Duxford in Cambridgeshire, where he enlists the help of local tradespeople to assist Paul and Sarah Behan. The couple had started on an extension to their small bungalow when the project had to be abandoned due to their son Joshua being diagnosed with a rare and aggressive form of liver cancer. The team puts in an impressive effort, but with only nine days to finish the job the challenge is extensive

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: The team helps a couple whose 24-year-old son Ryan has been living in hospital for the last five years, as they renovate the downstairs of their three-bedroom house in Bristol so he can move back home. The house needs a downstairs extension with all the bespoke care provision that Ryan will need, including physio space, a wet-room, a family area and the ability to access the entire ground floor, and if the family doesnt get this work done, Ryan will remain in hospital 50 miles away

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Ben Shephard hosts the quiz in which contestants answer questions to win turns on an arcade-style machine. Dropping tokens down a choice of four chutes, they hope to knock piles of them off a moving shelf - and the more they collect, the greater the prize fund. The player who has won the least amount is then eliminated, and the last one standing competes for a £10,000 jackpot

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: Beloved fluff monster Kylo, a 10-month-old rough collie, and golden retriever pup Sasha make return visits to the practice. Kylos serious leg deformities are causing significant pain, while Sashas deformed front left foot has left her without properly developed toes - and her struggles are increasing the more she grows. Professor Noel Fitzpatrick and his team need to find innovative solutions to resolve the problems both hounds present

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: A 10-year-old Dobermann is treated for an aggressive bone tumour in its leg. One option is a full limb amputation, but another could potentially save Rolos leg by cutting out the affected part of the bone and replacing it with a unique implant of Noels own invention - a scapula-humeral endoprosthesis. Five-year-old labrador Jeff is suffering from developmental elbow disease, which cannot be managed by medication alone. The day of his planned surgery for a full elbow replacement arrives, though bad news places the prospect of such treatment in jeopardy

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: In the heart of the West Midlands, Nick Knowles and local volunteers help a Dudley family whose three children have a genetic learning disorder. The Whitehouses tried to add an extension to their house, but after living in a building site for a year it had become too much. The build has to be completed in just nine days, and plummeting sub-zero temperatures make the task even more daunting

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: Nick Knowles heads to Duxford in Cambridgeshire, where he enlists the help of local tradespeople to assist Paul and Sarah Behan. The couple had started on an extension to their small bungalow when the project had to be abandoned due to their son Joshua being diagnosed with a rare and aggressive form of liver cancer. The team puts in an impressive effort, but with only nine days to finish the job the challenge is extensive

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: A six-month-old collie appears to have a developmental deformity where the bones in its elbows dont fit together, but after CT scans, Noel sees that the situation is even more complex. A Burmese mountain dog has a painful bulging disc, which Noel hopes to replace with a bespoke titanium spacer screw, while cat Elmo has a complex fracture to its left back leg after being hit by a car

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: A French bulldog is brought in after collapsing and struggling to move, and after a full medical assessment, Noel realises an exploded disc in the dogs neck is pressuring its spine to such an extent it is slowly causing paralysis. The vet also treats an excitable Staffordshire bull terrier suffering from a problem where the bones in its elbows do not fit properly and a cat that has been shot with an airgun

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: Noel treats 15-stone English mastiff Bear, who has a ruptured ligament in his knee - but as the dog goes into theatre, a major team effort is needed to get this massive patient through surgery. Siamese cat Bluebell is rushed in after being hit by a car and golden retriever Henry is suffering from a chronically damaged spinal disc

programme.title: Serial Killer with Piers Morgan
programme.desc: The broadcaster meets Mark Riebe, who was convicted for one murder but has confessed multiple times to the abduction and killing of 13 women along Floridas Gulf Coast. Although Riebe has since withdrawn his confessions, police believe he is one of the worst serial killers in Floridas history. Piers uses Riebes video and audio confessions, news archive and testimony to explore what sort of man would commit murder and then taunt the victims families for nearly 20 years

programme.title: Serial Killer with Piers Morgan
programme.desc: An interview with Lorenzo Gilyard, who was convicted of killing six people in and around Missouri between 1977 and 1993, and suspected of murdering a further seven more, earning him six life sentences. His prolific spree saw him labelled the Kansas City Strangler, and despite overwhelming DNA evidence pointing to his guilt, he continues to protest his innocence to this day. Here, Piers Morgan sets out to discover what drove a seemingly well-adjusted family man to kill

programme.title: Brit Cops Down Under
programme.desc: The final wave of UK recruits arrive. Ben is unsure whether hell stay in Australia, and Jay has his first day out on the beat and is apprehensive about carrying a weapon

programme.title: Brit Cops Down Under
programme.desc: From first days on the beat to stressful house-hunting, the reality of life in Perth hits our rookie cops. Ben is torn between missing his family and his new amazing life

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: MasterChef Australia
programme.desc: The cooks travel to Sydney to meet Peter Gilmore and watch him create squid, scallops and pipis on crispy eggplant with XO sauce - and then recreate the dish from memory

The player who has won the least amount is then eliminated, and the last one standing competes for a £10,000 jackpot

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon OBrien travel to East Sussex in their hunt to discover valuable items lost in peoples homes, with their finds including some Victorian street lamps

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: As part of the 2013 appeal, Nick Knowles and the team head to Peterborough to help Children in Need-funded organisation Little Miracles, which supports youngsters with disabilities and life-limiting illnesses and their families. However, whereas Mark, Chris, Julian and Billy normally renovate an existing property, for the first time they are knocking down a building and reconstructing it from the ground up - making it worth almost £1million. With just nine days to complete the job, theyll need help - and lots of it. Luckily, tradespeople turn out in force - from both the local area and across the country - giving their time for free

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: In the summer of 2015, West Sussex wife and mother-of-four Amanda fell off her bike while training for an endurance contest, breaking 11 bones, puncturing a lung, and snapping her collarbone and back. Paralysed, she spent the next six months at Stoke Mandevilles spinal unit, while her builder husband Vic looked after the children - but determined to compete again, she returned home in a wheelchair. However, the family home is no longer suitable for Amanda - so thats where Nick Knowles and the rest of the DIY SOS team come in, strengthened by a number of local tradesmen

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Ben Shephard hosts the quiz in which contestants answer questions to win turns on an arcade-style machine. Dropping tokens down a choice of four chutes, they hope to knock piles of them off a moving shelf - and the more they collect, the greater the prize fund. The player who has won the least amount is then eliminated, and the last one standing competes for a £10,000 jackpot

programme.title: Tipping Point

Dropping tokens down a choice of four chutes, they hope to knock piles of them off a moving shelf - and the more they collect, the greater the prize fund. The player who has won the least amount is then eliminated, and the last one standing competes for a £10,000 jackpot

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: Feisty feline Driver has already survived trauma during his seven years of life, when he lost an eye as the result of an accident. His indomitable spirit is about to be severely tested again, as hes rushed into Fitzpatricks as an emergency, suffering from a hip injury and serious trauma having been hit by a car. Seven-year-old Dobermann Dexter has serious spinal problems, collapsing on his back legs and tumbling on his front legs. His owners meet Noel to discuss options for his treatment

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: Scans reveal multiple sites of deformity affecting Milo the Dalmatians vertebrae, which are squashing both his spinal cord and the nerves coming out on either side. Noel offers the option of distraction fusion surgery to relieve both the pressure and the pain, while Laura and Max bring in their 10-month-old Chuskie pup Moon, who despite his youth has his life blighted by severe developmental elbow disease

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: The building crusaders come to the aid of 12-year-old Matthew from Telford, Shropshire, who has been stuck in hospital for three years after suffering cancer and a stroke. The youngsters head teacher and school friends have been fundraising to get him home, so now, Nick Knowles and the team - with the help of hundreds of volunteers - set out to make Matthews home suitable for his complex medical needs

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: As part of the 2013 appeal, Nick Knowles and the team head to Peterborough to help Children in Need-funded organisation Little Miracles, which supports youngsters with disabilities and life-limiting illnesses and their families. However, whereas Mark, Chris, Julian and Billy normally renovate an existing property, for the first time they are knocking down a building and reconstructing it from the ground up - making it worth almost £1million. With just nine days to complete the job, theyll need help - and lots of it. Luckily, tradespeople turn out in force - from both the local area and across the country - giving their time for free

programme.title: 999 Rescue Squad
programme.desc: A teenager is found with multiple stab wounds in the street near his home, an amateur tree surgeon is badly hurt when a branch falls on his leg and two schoolgirls are run over

programme.title: One Born Every Minute
programme.desc: Gail Wright, Leeds General Infirmarys most experienced midwife, is on hand to help 22-year-old Keely when she goes into labour. Meanwhile, 29-year-old Steve tries to mask his anxiety with humour as he and fiancee Katie, 27, prepare for the arrival of their baby, who has the congenital condition gastroschisis - characterised by the intestines protruding through the abdomen wall - and will require surgery just hours after being born

programme.title: One Born Every Minute
programme.desc: The stories of three women preparing to give birth in Leeds maternity wards. Leahs partner is in prison and will miss the arrival of her sixth baby, while Becky and John have been to all the classes and know exactly what to expect. Sophie hasnt read anything about childbirth and has no idea what lies in store, but luckily partner Martins experience from a previous relationship enables him to provide much-needed support

programme.title: Serial Killer with Piers Morgan
programme.desc: The broadcaster meets Bronx businessman Alex Henriquez, who was convicted for three murders in 1992. The victims had two things in common - they were all asphyxiated before being dumped by the highway and all three could be placed with Alex Henriquez shortly before their deaths. For 30 years the killer has protested his innocence, claiming the police set him up. Piers Morgan tries to uncover the truth

programme.title: Serial Killer with Piers Morgan
programme.sub-title: Confessions of a Serial Killer with Piers Morgan
programme.desc: The broadcaster comes face to face with Bernard Giles, who admits to picking up five women hitch-hiking through his neighbourhood in late 1973 and killing them all in cold blood. Fortunate to be spared the death penalty, Giles will never be released from prison. Now Piers tries to get inside his mind, to explore his psychological make-up and understand what compelled him to commit these brutal crimes

programme.title: Brit Cops Down Under
programme.sub-title: Its Not All Beaches and Blue Skies
programme.desc: Anna hits the first milestone in Australia without the support of family: Isabelles 8th birthday. Jay settles into work, but life at home is not so smooth

programme.title: Brit Cops Down Under
programme.desc: Maggie and Darren start to settle in at Perths central station, but Anna struggles with her work-life balance. Michael gets a very unusual reptilian call out

programme.title: Serial Killer with Piers Morgan
programme.desc: An interview with Lorenzo Gilyard, who was convicted of killing six people in and around Missouri between 1977 and 1993, and suspected of murdering a further seven more, earning him six life sentences. His prolific spree saw him labelled the Kansas City Strangler, and despite overwhelming DNA evidence pointing to his guilt, he continues to protest his innocence to this day. Here, Piers Morgan sets out to discover what drove a seemingly well-adjusted family man to kill

programme.title: Brit Cops Down Under
programme.desc: The final wave of UK recruits arrive. Ben is unsure whether hell stay in Australia, and Jay has his first day out on the beat and is apprehensive about carrying a weapon

programme.title: Brit Cops Down Under
programme.desc: From first days on the beat to stressful house-hunting, the reality of life in Perth hits our rookie cops. Ben is torn between missing his family and his new amazing life

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: MasterChef Australia
programme.desc: The cooks travel to Sydney to meet Peter Gilmore and watch him create squid, scallops and pipis on crispy eggplant with XO sauce - and then recreate the dish from memory

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Ben Shephard hosts the quiz in which contestants answer questions to win turns on an arcade-style machine. Dropping tokens down a choice of four chutes, they hope to knock piles of them off a moving shelf - and the more they collect, the greater the prize fund. The player who has won the least amount is then eliminated, and the last one standing competes for a £10,000 jackpot

programme.title: Tipping Point

The player who has won the least amount is then eliminated, and the last one standing competes for a £10,000 jackpot

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon OBrien travel to East Sussex in their hunt to discover valuable items lost in peoples homes, with their finds including some Victorian street lamps

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: As part of the 2013 appeal, Nick Knowles and the team head to Peterborough to help Children in Need-funded organisation Little Miracles, which supports youngsters with disabilities and life-limiting illnesses and their families. However, whereas Mark, Chris, Julian and Billy normally renovate an existing property, for the first time they are knocking down a building and reconstructing it from the ground up - making it worth almost £1million. With just nine days to complete the job, theyll need help - and lots of it. Luckily, tradespeople turn out in force - from both the local area and across the country - giving their time for free

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: In the summer of 2015, West Sussex wife and mother-of-four Amanda fell off her bike while training for an endurance contest, breaking 11 bones, puncturing a lung, and snapping her collarbone and back. Paralysed, she spent the next six months at Stoke Mandevilles spinal unit, while her builder husband Vic looked after the children - but determined to compete again, she returned home in a wheelchair. However, the family home is no longer suitable for Amanda - so thats where Nick Knowles and the rest of the DIY SOS team come in, strengthened by a number of local tradesmen

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Ben Shephard hosts the quiz in which contestants answer questions to win turns on an arcade-style machine. Dropping tokens down a choice of four chutes, they hope to knock piles of them off a moving shelf - and the more they collect, the greater the prize fund. The player who has won the least amount is then eliminated, and the last one standing competes for a £10,000 jackpot

The player who has won the least amount is then eliminated, and the last one standing competes for a £10,000 jackpot

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: Feisty feline Driver has already survived trauma during his seven years of life, when he lost an eye as the result of an accident. His indomitable spirit is about to be severely tested again, as hes rushed into Fitzpatricks as an emergency, suffering from a hip injury and serious trauma having been hit by a car. Seven-year-old Dobermann Dexter has serious spinal problems, collapsing on his back legs and tumbling on his front legs. His owners meet Noel to discuss options for his treatment

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: Scans reveal multiple sites of deformity affecting Milo the Dalmatians vertebrae, which are squashing both his spinal cord and the nerves coming out on either side. Noel offers the option of distraction fusion surgery to relieve both the pressure and the pain, while Laura and Max bring in their 10-month-old Chuskie pup Moon, who despite his youth has his life blighted by severe developmental elbow disease

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: The building crusaders come to the aid of 12-year-old Matthew from Telford, Shropshire, who has been stuck in hospital for three years after suffering cancer and a stroke. The youngsters head teacher and school friends have been fundraising to get him home, so now, Nick Knowles and the team - with the help of hundreds of volunteers - set out to make Matthews home suitable for his complex medical needs

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: As part of the 2013 appeal, Nick Knowles and the team head to Peterborough to help Children in Need-funded organisation Little Miracles, which supports youngsters with disabilities and life-limiting illnesses and their families. However, whereas Mark, Chris, Julian and Billy normally renovate an existing property, for the first time they are knocking down a building and reconstructing it from the ground up - making it worth almost £1million. With just nine days to complete the job, theyll need help - and lots of it. Luckily, tradespeople turn out in force - from both the local area and across the country - giving their time for free

programme.title: 999 Rescue Squad
programme.desc: A teenager is found with multiple stab wounds in the street near his home, an amateur tree surgeon is badly hurt when a branch falls on his leg and two schoolgirls are run over

programme.title: One Born Every Minute
programme.desc: Gail Wright, Leeds General Infirmarys most experienced midwife, is on hand to help 22-year-old Keely when she goes into labour. Meanwhile, 29-year-old Steve tries to mask his anxiety with humour as he and fiancee Katie, 27, prepare for the arrival of their baby, who has the congenital condition gastroschisis - characterised by the intestines protruding through the abdomen wall - and will require surgery just hours after being born

programme.title: One Born Every Minute
programme.desc: The stories of three women preparing to give birth in Leeds maternity wards. Leahs partner is in prison and will miss the arrival of her sixth baby, while Becky and John have been to all the classes and know exactly what to expect. Sophie hasnt read anything about childbirth and has no idea what lies in store, but luckily partner Martins experience from a previous relationship enables him to provide much-needed support

programme.title: Serial Killer with Piers Morgan
programme.desc: The broadcaster meets Bronx businessman Alex Henriquez, who was convicted for three murders in 1992. The victims had two things in common - they were all asphyxiated before being dumped by the highway and all three could be placed with Alex Henriquez shortly before their deaths. For 30 years the killer has protested his innocence, claiming the police set him up. Piers Morgan tries to uncover the truth

programme.title: Serial Killer with Piers Morgan
programme.sub-title: Confessions of a Serial Killer with Piers Morgan
programme.desc: The broadcaster comes face to face with Bernard Giles, who admits to picking up five women hitch-hiking through his neighbourhood in late 1973 and killing them all in cold blood. Fortunate to be spared the death penalty, Giles will never be released from prison. Now Piers tries to get inside his mind, to explore his psychological make-up and understand what compelled him to commit these brutal crimes

programme.title: Brit Cops Down Under
programme.sub-title: Its Not All Beaches and Blue Skies
programme.desc: Anna hits the first milestone in Australia without the support of family: Isabelles 8th birthday. Jay settles into work, but life at home is not so smooth

programme.title: Brit Cops Down Under
programme.desc: Maggie and Darren start to settle in at Perths central station, but Anna struggles with her work-life balance. Michael gets a very unusual reptilian call out

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Derek collects a Ford Thames 400E that once belonged to the pop band Edison Lighthouse. Dave heads to York to collect an Astra GTE convertible

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: A series of head-turning supercharged cars head to the Mathewsons auction room. Plus, going under Dereks hammer - a Ford Escort XR3 and a beautiful MGA

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Derek heads out to pick up a pair of beautiful Swedish models - a Saab 96L and a Volvo P1800ES. Plus, a rare British AC Aceca comes up for sale

programme.title: Great Coastal Railway Journeys
programme.desc: The final leg of this South Coast adventure begins in Fishbourne, the location of one of the most significant Roman sites in Britain. Heading into East Sussex, Michael Portillo visits Brighton, and for the final stop he celebrates the burgeoning winemaking industry of the South Downs

programme.title: Villages by the Sea
programme.desc: Archaeologist Ben Robinson examines the history of the Lancashire village Sunderland Point, which is cut off twice a day by the tide and has become a haven for wildlife. He reveals it was once a busy port that was instrumental in the slave trade, and at the forefront of the luxury goods business that transformed 18th-century Britain.

programme.title: Villages by the Sea
programme.desc: Archaeologist Ben Robinson examines the history of Walberswick, the former medieval port on the Suffolk coast, which is now a favourite retreat for writers, artists and day trippers. For centuries the village lurched from prosperity to poverty and in medieval times a bitter battle for supremacy was fought against the neighbouring port of Dunwich

programme.title: Villages by the Sea
programme.desc: Archaeologist Ben Robinson examines the history of Robin Hoods Bay, the fishing village on the North Yorkshire coast, revealing tales of smuggling intrigue and bravery

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Derek and Paul are off to Leeds on a rare father and son road trip to pick up a VW Cabriolet and a Lotus Elite

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: A beautiful looking sports car has been fooling the punters and intriguing Derek. Its a Challenger E-Type - a fibreglass replica created from an E-Type mould

programme.title: War Factories
programme.sub-title: Enterprise: The Rise of the Aircraft Carrier
programme.desc: The story of the rise of the aircraft carrier and how it changed the tactics of sea warfare

programme.title: Rise of the Nazis
programme.desc: The documentary examines the actions of Hitler and his inner circle as the Third Reich faced collapse in the final weeks of the Second World War. Germany was losing the war but Hitler refused to surrender, instead pursuing a policy of Total War, which played out as a psychological drama within his inner circle

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce presents the show from Erddig in North Wales. Items brought in to be valued include a mourning ring with a connection to Charlotte Bronte, a Welsh love spoon handed down through the generations, a jade figurine from the Summer Palace in Beijing, and an 18th-century wine bottle which has links to a Scottish artist

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce presents the show from Buckfast Abbey in Devon, discovering the long tradition of beekeeping and sampling some of the famous honey. Items brought in to be valued include a diamond tiara, a collection of First World War medals, some miniature furniture, a Chinese vase, and a rare teddy bear

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Jack and Amy are on a poignant trip to collect some motorbikes from a widow in the North East of England

programme.title: War Factories
programme.sub-title: Enterprise: The Rise of the Aircraft Carrier
programme.desc: The story of the rise of the aircraft carrier and how it changed the tactics of sea warfare

programme.title: Rise of the Nazis
programme.desc: The documentary examines the actions of Hitler and his inner circle as the Third Reich faced collapse in the final weeks of the Second World War. Germany was losing the war but Hitler refused to surrender, instead pursuing a policy of Total War, which played out as a psychological drama within his inner circle

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce presents the show from Erddig in North Wales. Items brought in to be valued include a mourning ring with a connection to Charlotte Bronte, a Welsh love spoon handed down through the generations, a jade figurine from the Summer Palace in Beijing, and an 18th-century wine bottle which has links to a Scottish artist

programme.title: Simon Reeves South America
programme.desc: Simon starts his travels through Brazil in one of the remotest regions of the Amazon with the Waiapi people, who cling on to their traditional way of life, which is under threat from logging and mining interests. In Manaus, the city at the heart of the Amazon, he visits a neglected indigenous neighbourhood and meets a nurse who was the only source of healthcare during the pandemic. Simon ends this leg of his journey on the west coast in the city of Rio de Janeiro, where the government has built a hi-tech control room to monitor all parts of the city for potential disasters such as floods

programme.title: Dom Chineas Cornish Workshop
programme.desc: Dom Chinea tries out water dowsing so he can fill his new pond. He and Sam Lovegrove fix some church bells and then put a surf lifesaving clubs quad bike back on the beach

programme.title: Indian Ocean with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: The adventurer begins the final leg of his journey on the northern tip of Sumatra in western Indonesia, near the epicentre of the 2004 Boxing Day tsunami, finding out how the province of Banda Aceh has undergone many changes since the disaster. He also explores the illegal trade in exotic pets in the Indonesian capital of Jakarta, before heading for Australia, the final country on his epic journey. There he visits the unspoilt wilderness of the Kimberley region, meets a crocodile hunter and goes fishing with natives campaigning to stop the construction of a giant gas plant

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Jack and Amy are on a poignant trip to collect some motorbikes from a widow in the North East of England

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Dereks off to Staffordshire to collect an unusual haul, including a Blue Star truck and a mysterious Lion Omnibus Reliant

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Derek and Paul are off to Leeds on a rare father and son road trip to pick up a VW Cabriolet and a Lotus Elite

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: A beautiful looking sports car has been fooling the punters and intriguing Derek. Its a Challenger E-Type - a fibreglass replica created from an E-Type mould

programme.title: American Historys Biggest Fibs with Lucy Worsley
programme.desc: The historian reveals the myths and deceptions told following the United States emergence as a superpower after the Second World War. The 1950s and early 1960s in America is remembered as a golden era of abundance, harmony and the American dream made real. Lucy Worsley reveals that to have been a carefully constructed illusion and that the era of Americas supremacy was a time of government deception, racial conflict and fears of nuclear annihilation

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Villages by the Sea
programme.desc: Archaeologist Ben Robinson examines the history of Lindisfarne, which lies off the Northumberland coast. From what became known as the Holy Island of Lindisfarne, monks spread Christianity to the rest of northern England and created one of Britains finest treasures - the Lindisfarne Gospels. Viking attacks caused the monks to flee but the village survived and today the community has to share it with thousands of tourists

programme.title: Villages by the Sea
programme.desc: Archaeologist Ben Robinson examines the history of Clovelly in Devon, looking at its transformation from fishing harbour to romantic Victorian seaside resort. Thanks to a powerful and pioneering woman, Clovelly found itself at the forefront of the holiday revolution, and even today cars are banned and the village is privately owned, helping to preserve it as a reminder of a bygone age

programme.title: Villages by the Sea
programme.desc: Ben Robinson explores Parkgate on the estuary of the River Dee, Cheshire. The village is landlocked due to the estuarys shifting silt, but 250 years ago it was a bustling harbour

programme.title: Villages by the Sea
programme.desc: Archaeologist Ben Robinson unearths the Suffolk village of Orfords history of defending the British Isles, and uncovers a local legend involving smugglers and the local pub

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Paul and Jack head to Staffordshire to pick up five vehicles from collector Robs colossal barn, including a Mini and a Morris Minor

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Daves in Lincolnshire picking up a 1935 Riley Falcon - a good-looking saloon car, with a pre-select gearbox

programme.title: War Factories
programme.desc: In the 1930s, Skodas Czech factory was one of the biggest arms producers in Europe and became the cover for espionage, sabotage and the liberation of Jews from all over Europe

programme.title: Rise of the Nazis
programme.desc: At the end of March 1945, Nazi Germany is on the brink of collapse and with Berlin under daily bombardment, Hitler permanently retreated to his bunker, a series of 30 cramped rooms under the Reich Chancellery, where night and day merge into one. As his life becomes increasingly bizarre, Hitler and Joseph Goebbels look for signs from German folklore that fate will intervene

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce presents the show from Piece Hall in Halifax, the only surviving 18th-century cloth hall where textiles were once traded. Items featured include a sapphire that jewellery specialist John Benjamin thinks is the biggest he has ever seen - but which the owner thinks is fake. Other finds include a Chinese imperial robe, a mysterious set of 17th-century doors, and the oldest piece of glass to ever appear on the show

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce presents the show from Wrest Park in Bedfordshire, where expert Ronnie Archer-Morgan challenges viewers to guess the origins of three pieces of ornate tribal jewellery. Objects brought in to be valued include a piece of Murano glass inspired by Picasso, a collection of 1950s car posters, a set of blueprints for the bouncing bomb, and a silver flagon that was presented to a local church in 1684

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.sub-title: Mini Cooper and Chevy Pick Up
programme.desc: Behind the scenes of a North Yorkshire-based, family-run historic car auction business. Featured vehicles include a Mini Cooper and Chevrolet Pick-up truck

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: A rare 1980s Sierra Cosworth draws in a crowd of admiring Ford fans, while a restorer delights buyers with his immaculate 1966 Sunbeam Rapier and Sarah takes a shine to a caravan
